t.haleem: On a Day when they will be punished by the Fire
t.maariful: (It will be) the Day when they will be heated on the Fire
t.khattab: ˹It is˺ the Day they will be tormented over the Fire
t.ghali: The Day when it is they (who) will be tempted (Or: tried) at the Fire
t.irving: Some day they will be tested over the Fire
t.iwq: It is the Day they will be tormented over the Fire

t_id.kemenag: (Hari pembalasan itu) ialah pada hari ketika mereka diazab di atas api neraka.
t_id.sabiq: Pada saat mereka dihadapkan ke neraka, mereka disiksa dengan sengatan apinya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu pada hari ketika mereka di azab di dalam neraka") yakni sewaktu mereka diazab di dalamnya, lalu dikatakan kepada mereka ketika mereka sedang diazab,
t_id.iwq: (Hari pembalasan itu) ialah pada hari ketika mereka diazab di atas api neraka.

tafsir.muyassar-ar: يوم الجزاء، يوم يُعذَّبون بالإحراق بالنار،  ويقال لهم:  ذوقوا عذابكم الذي كنتم به تستعجلون في الدنيا.
tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يوم هم على النار يفتنون» أي يعذبون فيها ويقال لهم حين التعذيب
tafsir.siraj-ar: يَوۡمَ هُمۡ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفۡتَنُونَ (يُفْتَنُونَ: يُحْرَقُونَ، وَيُعَذَّبُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu pada hari ketika mereka di azab di dalam neraka") yakni sewaktu mereka diazab di dalamnya, lalu dikatakan kepada mereka ketika mereka sedang diazab

ar: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتۡنَتَكُمۡ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِی كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
ar_simple: ذوقوا فتنتكم هذا ٱلذی كنتم به تستعجلون

t.sahih-int: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient
t.asad: [and will be told:] “Taste this your trial! It is this that you were so hastily asking for!”
t.yusuf-ali: Taste ye your trial! This is what ye used to ask to be hastened
t.pickthall: (And it will be said unto them): Taste your torment (which ye inflicted). This is what ye sought to hasten
t.arberry: Taste your trial! This is that you were seeking to hasten
t.hilali-khan: Taste you your trial (burning)! This is what you used to ask to be hastened
t.itani: “Taste your ordeal. This is what you used to challenge.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Taste you your trial! This is what you used to ask to be hastened!"
t.qarib: [And will be told], "Taste your scheme. This is what you were rushing toward
t.wahiduddin: Taste your trial. This is what you sought to hasten
t.shakir: Taste your persecution! this is what you would hasten on
t.haleem: ‘Taste the punishment! This is what you wished to hasten.’
t.maariful: (and it will be said to them,) “Taste (the punishment of) your mischief. This is what you have been asking to be brought sooner.”
t.khattab: ˹They will be told,˺ “Taste your torment! This is what you sought to hasten.”
t.ghali: Taste your temptation! (Or: trial) This is what you were seeking to hasten
t.irving: Taste your test! This is what you wanted to hurry up
t.iwq: And will be told, "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient

t_id.kemenag: (Dikatakan kepada mereka): "Rasakanlah azabmu itu. Inilah azab yang dulu kamu minta untuk disegerakan".
t_id.sabiq: Ketika itu dikatakan kepada mereka, "Rasakanlah siksaan kalian ini! Inilah yang dahulu, ketika di dunia, pernah kalian minta disegerakan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Rasakanlah azab kalian) siksaan kalian. (Inilah) azab (yang dahulu kalian minta supaya disegerakan") di dunia dengan nada mengejek.
t_id.iwq: (Dikatakan kepada mereka): "Rasakanlah azabmu itu. Inilah azab yang dulu kamu minta untuk disegerakan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ذوقوا فتنتكم» تعذيبكم «هذا» التعذيب «الذي كنتم به تستعجلون» في الدنيا استهزاء
tafsir.siraj-ar: ذُوقُواْ فِتۡنَتَكُمۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ (فِتْنَتَكُمْ: عَذَابَكُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Rasakanlah azab kalian) siksaan kalian. (Inilah) azab (yang dahulu kalian minta supaya disegerakan") di dunia dengan nada mengejek

ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِینَ فِی جَنَّـٰتࣲ وَعُیُونٍ
ar_simple: إن ٱلمتقین فی جنت وعیون

t.sahih-int: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs
t.asad: [But,] behold, the God-conscious will find themselves amid gardens and springs
t.yusuf-ali: As to the Righteous, they will be in the midst of Gardens and Springs
t.pickthall: Lo! those who keep from evil will dwell amid gardens and watersprings
t.arberry: Surely the godfearing shall be among gardens and fountains
t.hilali-khan: Verily, the Muttaqun (pious - see V. 2:2) will be in the midst of Gardens and Springs (in the Paradise)
t.itani: But the pious are amidst gardens and springs.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, those who have Taqwa will be in the midst of Gardens and Springs,
t.qarib: While those who were mindful of God will be among Gardens and springs
t.wahiduddin: Surely the God-fearing will find themselves in the midst of gardens and springs
t.shakir: Surely those who guard (against evil) shall be in gardens and fountains
t.haleem: The righteous will be in Gardens with [flowing] springs
t.maariful: The God-fearing (on the other hand) will be in gardens and springs
t.khattab: Indeed, the righteous will be amid Gardens and springs
t.ghali: Surely the pious will be in (the midst of) Gardens and Springs
t.irving: The heedful will be in gardens and by springs
t.iwq: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa itu berada dalam taman-taman (surga) dan mata air-mata air,
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang taat dan takut kepada Allah akan memperoleh kenikmatan di taman- taman surga dan mata air-mata air yang tak bisa terbayangkan,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa berada di dalam surga) di taman-taman surga (dan di mata air-mata air) yang mengalir di dalam surga.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa itu berada dalam taman-taman (surga) dan mata air-mata air,

tafsir.muyassar-ar: إن الذين اتقوا الله في جنات عظيمة، وعيون ماء جارية، أعطاهم الله جميع مُناهم من أصناف النعيم، فأخذوا ذلك راضين به، فَرِحة به نفوسهم، إنهم كانوا قبل ذلك النعيم محسنين في الدنيا بأعمالهم الصالحة.
tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن المتقين في جنات» بساتين «وعيون» تجري فيها
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٍ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa berada di dalam surga) di taman-taman surga (dan di mata air-mata air) yang mengalir di dalam surga

ar: ءَاخِذِینَ مَاۤ ءَاتَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوا۟ قَبۡلَ ذَ ٰلِكَ مُحۡسِنِینَ
ar_simple: ءاخذین ما ءاتىهم ربهم إنهم كانوا قبل ذ لك محسنین

t.sahih-int: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good
t.asad: enjoying all that their Sustainer will have granted them [because], verily, they were doers of good in the past
t.yusuf-ali: Taking joy in the things which their Lord gives them, because, before then, they lived a good life
t.pickthall: Taking that which their Lord giveth them; for lo! aforetime they were doers of good
t.arberry: taking whatsoever their Lord has given them; they were good-doers before that
t.hilali-khan: Taking joy in the things which their Lord has given them. Verily, they were before this Muhsinun (good-doers - see V)
t.itani: Receiving what their Lord has given them. They were virtuous before that.
t.mubarakpuri: Taking joy in the things which their Lord has given them. Verily, they were before this doers of good.
t.qarib: accepting what their Lord has given them. Verily, they were those who do good
t.wahiduddin: They shall receive what their Lord will bestow on them. They have done good works in the past
t.shakir: Taking what their Lord gives them; surely they were before that, the doers of good
t.haleem: They will receive their Lord’s gifts because of the good they did before
t.maariful: receiving what their Lord will have given to them. Indeed, prior to this, they were good in their deeds
t.khattab: ˹joyfully˺ receiving what their Lord will grant them. Before this ˹reward˺ they were truly good-doers ˹in the world˺
t.ghali: Taking whatever their Lord has brought them; surely, they were fair-doers before that
t.irving: partaking of whatever their Lord has given them. They had acted kindly even before that
t.iwq: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good

t_id.kemenag: sambil menerima segala pemberian Rabb mereka. Sesungguhnya mereka sebelum itu di dunia adalah orang-orang yang berbuat kebaikan.
t_id.sabiq: sambil menerima pahala dan kemuliaan yang diberikan oleh Tuhan kepada mereka. Sebelum itu, ketika di dunia, mereka itu adalah orang-orang yang baik dalam melaksanakan apa yang diminta dari mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sambil mengambil) menjadi Hal dari Dhamir yang terkandung di dalam Khabarnya Inna (apa yang didatangkan kepada mereka) apa yang diberikan kepada mereka (oleh Rabb mereka) yaitu berupa pahala-pahala. (Sesungguhnya mereka sebelum itu) sebelum mereka masuk surga (adalah orang-orang yang berbuat baik) di dunia.
t_id.iwq: sambil menerima segala pemberian Rabb mereka. Sesungguhnya mereka sebelum itu di dunia adalah orang-orang yang berbuat kebaikan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «آخذين» حال من الضمير في خبر إن «ما آتاهم» أعطاهم «ربهم» من الثواب «إنهم كانوا قبل ذلك» أي دخولهم الجنة «محسنين» في الدنيا
tafsir.siraj-ar: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَبۡلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحۡسِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sambil mengambil) menjadi Hal dari Dhamir yang terkandung di dalam Khabarnya Inna (apa yang didatangkan kepada mereka) apa yang diberikan kepada mereka (oleh Rabb mereka) yaitu berupa pahala-pahala. (Sesungguhnya mereka sebelum itu) sebelum mereka masuk surga (adalah orang-orang yang berbuat baik) di dunia

ar: كَانُوا۟ قَلِیلࣰا مِّنَ ٱلَّیۡلِ مَا یَهۡجَعُونَ
ar_simple: كانوا قلیلا من ٱلیل ما یهجعون

t.sahih-int: They used to sleep but little of the night
t.asad: they would lie asleep during but a small part of the night
t.yusuf-ali: They were in the habit of sleeping but little by night
t.pickthall: They used to sleep but little of the night
t.arberry: Little of the night would they slumber
t.hilali-khan: They used to sleep but little by night [invoking their Lord (Allah) and praying, with fear and hope
t.itani: They used to sleep a little at night.
t.mubarakpuri: They used to sleep but little by night.
t.qarib: They used to sleep a little at night
t.wahiduddin: sleeping little in the night-time
t.shakir: They used to sleep but little in the night
t.haleem: sleeping only little at night
t.maariful: They used to sleep little in the night
t.khattab: they used to sleep only little in the night
t.ghali: They used to slumber (only) little of the night
t.irving: they used to slumber only a portion of the night
t.iwq: And they used to sleep but little of the night

t_id.kemenag: Di dunia mereka sedikit sekali tidur diwaktu malam.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka selalu tidur sedikit di waktu malam dan sering bangun malam untuk beribadah. Dan pada akhir malam mereka selalu meminta ampunan Tuhan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka sedikit sekali tidur di waktu malam) lafal Yahja'uuna artinya mereka tidur, dan lafal Maa adalah Zaidah, sedangkan lafal Yahja'uuna adalah Khabar dari Kaana, dan lafal Qaliilan adalah Zharaf. Yakni, mereka tidur di malam hari hanya sedikit, karena kebanyakan dipakai untuk salat.
t_id.iwq: Di dunia mereka sedikit sekali tidur diwaktu malam.

tafsir.muyassar-ar: كان هؤلاء المحسنون قليلا من الليل ما ينامون، يُصَلُّون لربهم قانتين له، وفي أواخر الليل قبيل الفجر يستغفرون الله من ذنوبهم.
tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كانوا قليلا من الليل ما يهجعون» ينامون، وما زائدة ويهجعون خبر كان وقليلا ظرف، أي ينامون في زمن يسير من الليل ويصلون أكثره
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَانُواْ قَلِيلٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ مَا يَهۡجَعُونَ (يَهْجَعُونَ: يَنَامُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka sedikit sekali tidur di waktu malam) lafal Yahja'uuna artinya mereka tidur, dan lafal Maa adalah Zaidah, sedangkan lafal Yahja'uuna adalah Khabar dari Kaana, dan lafal Qaliilan adalah Zharaf. Yakni, mereka tidur di malam hari hanya sedikit, karena kebanyakan dipakai untuk salat

ar: وَبِٱلۡأَسۡحَارِ هُمۡ یَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ
ar_simple: وبٱلأسحار هم یستغفرون

t.sahih-int: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness
t.asad: and would pray for forgiveness from their innermost hearts
t.yusuf-ali: And in the hour of early dawn, they (were found) praying for Forgiveness
t.pickthall: And ere the dawning of each day would seek forgiveness
t.arberry: and in the mornings they would ask for forgiveness
t.hilali-khan: And in the hours before dawn, they were (found) asking (Allah) for forgiveness
t.itani: And at dawn, they would pray for pardon.
t.mubarakpuri: And in the hours before dawn, they were asking for forgiveness.
t.qarib: and at dawn they would pray for forgiveness
t.wahiduddin: praying at dawn for God's pardon
t.shakir: And in the morning they asked forgiveness
t.haleem: praying at dawn for God’s forgiveness
t.maariful: and in the hours before dawn they used to pray for forgiveness
t.khattab: and pray for forgiveness before dawn
t.ghali: And before dawn, it is they (who) would seek forgiveness
t.irving: while in vigils towards dawning they sought forgiveness
t.iwq: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness

t_id.kemenag: Dan selalu memohonkan ampunan diwaktu pagi sebelum fajar.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka selalu tidur sedikit di waktu malam dan sering bangun malam untuk beribadah. Dan pada akhir malam mereka selalu meminta ampunan Tuhan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan di akhir-akhir malam mereka memohon ampun) mereka berdoa dengan mengucapkan, "Allaahumaghfir Lanaa", Ya Allah ampunilah kami.
t_id.iwq: Dan selalu memohonkan ampunan diwaktu pagi sebelum fajar.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وبالأسحار هم يستغفرون» يقولون: اللهم اغفر لنا
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَبِٱلۡأَسۡحَارِ هُمۡ يَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ (وَبِالْأَسْحَارِ: آخِرِ اللَّيْلِ، قُبَيْلَ الفَجْرِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan di akhir-akhir malam mereka memohon ampun) mereka berdoa dengan mengucapkan, "Allaahumaghfir Lanaa", Ya Allah ampunilah kami

ar: وَفِیۤ أَمۡوَ ٰلِهِمۡ حَقࣱّ لِّلسَّاۤئِلِ وَٱلۡمَحۡرُومِ
ar_simple: وفی أمو لهم حق للسائل وٱلمحروم

t.sahih-int: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived
t.asad: and [would assign] in all that they possessed a due share unto such as might ask [for help] and such as might suffer privation
t.yusuf-ali: And in their wealth and possessions (was remembered) the right of the (needy,) him who asked, and him who (for some reason) was prevented (from asking)
t.pickthall: And in their wealth the beggar and the outcast had due share
t.arberry: and the beggar and the outcast had a share in their wealth
t.hilali-khan: And in their properties there was the right of the beggar, and the Mahrum (the poor who does not ask the others)
t.itani: And in their wealth, there was a share for the beggar and the deprived.
t.mubarakpuri: And in their wealth there was the right of the Sa'il and the Mahrum.
t.qarib: and assign a share of their wealth to the needy and the deprived
t.wahiduddin: and sharing their possessions with the beggars and the deprived
t.shakir: And in their property was a portion due to him who begs and to him who is denied (good)
t.haleem: giving a rightful share of their wealth to the beggar and the deprived
t.maariful: and in their wealth, there was a right for one who asks and for one who is deprived
t.khattab: And in their wealth there was a rightful share ˹fulfilled˺ for the beggar and the poor
t.ghali: And in their riches, the beggar and the dispossessed have what is truthfully their due
t.irving: The beggar and the destitute had some right to their wealth
t.iwq: And from their properties was given the right of the needy petitioner and the deprived

t_id.kemenag: Dan pada harta-harta mereka ada hak untuk orang miskin yang meminta dan orang miskin yang tidak mendapat bagian.
t_id.sabiq: Di dalam harta mereka terdapat hak orang-orang yang memerlukan, baik yang meminta maupun yang tidak.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan pada harta-harta mereka ada hak untuk orang miskin yang meminta dan orang miskin yang tidak meminta-minta) karena ia memelihara dirinya dari perbuatan itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan pada harta-harta mereka ada hak untuk orang miskin yang meminta dan orang miskin yang tidak mendapat bagian.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وفي أموالهم حق للسائل والمحروم» الذي لا يسأل لتعففه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَفِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ حَقّٞ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلۡمَحۡرُومِ (لِّلسَّائِلِ: لِلْمُحْتَاجِ الَّذِي يَسْأَلُ النَّاسَ, وَالْمَحْرُومِ: الَّذِي لَا يَسْأَلُ النَّاسَ حَيَاءً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan pada harta-harta mereka ada hak untuk orang miskin yang meminta dan orang miskin yang tidak meminta-minta) karena ia memelihara dirinya dari perbuatan itu

ar: وَفِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ءَایَـٰتࣱ لِّلۡمُوقِنِینَ
ar_simple: وفی ٱلأرض ءایت للموقنین

t.sahih-int: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]
t.asad: AND ON EARTH there are signs [of God’s existence, visible] to all who are endowed with inner certainty
t.yusuf-ali: On the earth are signs for those of assured Faith
t.pickthall: And in the earth are portents for those whose faith is sure
t.arberry: In the earth are signs for those having sure faith
t.hilali-khan: And on the earth are signs for those who have Faith with certainty
t.itani: And on earth are signs for the convinced.
t.mubarakpuri: And on the earth are signs for those who have faith with certainty.
t.qarib: For the certain [in faith], they are signs on earth
t.wahiduddin: On the earth, and in yourselves
t.shakir: And in the earth there are signs for those who are sure
t.haleem: On earth there are signs for those with sure faith––
t.maariful: In the earth, there are signs for those who (seek truth to) believe
t.khattab: There are ˹countless˺ signs on earth for those with sure faith
t.ghali: And in the earth are signs for the ones having certitude
t.irving: On earth there are signs for the convinced
t.iwq: And on the earth are signs for the certain in faith

t_id.kemenag: Dan di bumi itu terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah) bagi orang-orang yang yakin.
t_id.sabiq: Di bumi ini terdapat banyak bukti jelas yang dapat menghantarkan kepada keyakinan bagi orang yang mau menempuhnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan di bumi itu) yakni gunung-gunung, tanahnya, lautan, pohon-pohonan, buah-buahan, dan tumbuh-tumbuhannya serta lain-lainnya (terdapat tanda-tanda) yang menunjukkan akan kekuasaan Allah swt. dan keesaan-Nya (bagi orang-orang yang yakin).
t_id.iwq: Dan di bumi itu terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah) bagi orang-orang yang yakin.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وفي الأرض» من الجبال والبحار والأشجار والثمار والنبات وغيرها «آيات» دلالات على قدرة الله سبحانه وتعالى ووحدانيته «للموقنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَفِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ءَايَٰتٞ لِّلۡمُوقِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan di bumi itu) yakni gunung-gunung, tanahnya, lautan, pohon-pohonan, buah-buahan, dan tumbuh-tumbuhannya serta lain-lainnya (terdapat tanda-tanda) yang menunjukkan akan kekuasaan Allah swt. dan keesaan-Nya (bagi orang-orang yang yakin)

ar: وَفِیۤ أَنفُسِكُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
ar_simple: وفی أنفسكم أفلا تبصرون

t.sahih-int: And in yourselves. Then will you not see
t.asad: just as [there are signs thereof] within your own selves: can you not, then, see
t.yusuf-ali: As also in your own selves: Will ye not then see
t.pickthall: And (also) in yourselves. Can ye then not see
t.arberry: and in your selves; what, do you not see
t.hilali-khan: And also in your ownselves. Will you not then see
t.itani: And within yourselves. Do you not see?
t.mubarakpuri: And also in yourselves. Will you not then see
t.qarib: and in yourselves, will you not see
t.wahiduddin: there are signs for firm believers. Do you not see then
t.shakir: And in your own souls (too); will you not then see
t.haleem: and in yourselves too, do you not see?––
t.maariful: and in your own selves! So, do you not perceive
t.khattab: as there are within yourselves. Can you not see
t.ghali: And in your selves; do you then not behold
t.irving: and even within yourselves; do you not notice them
t.iwq: And in yourselves. Then will you not see

t_id.kemenag: dan (juga) pada dirimu sendiri. Maka apakah kamu tidak memperhatikan?
t_id.sabiq: Di dalam diri kalian juga terdapat bukti-bukti kekuasaan Allah yang sangat jelas. Apakah kalian melalaikannya sehingga tidak memperhatikan?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan juga pada diri kalian sendiri) terdapat pula tanda-tanda yang menunjukkan kekuasaan dan keesaan-Nya, yaitu mulai dari permulaan penciptaan kalian hingga akhirnya, dan di dalam susunan penciptaan kalian terkandung pula keajaiban-keajaiban. (Maka apakah kalian tidak memperhatikan?) akan hal tersebut yang karena itu lalu kalian dapat menyimpulkan akan Penciptanya dan kekuasaan-Nya yang Maha Besar.
t_id.iwq: dan (juga) pada dirimu sendiri. Maka apakah kamu tidak memperhatikan?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وفي أنفسكم» آيات أيضا من مبدأ خلقكم إلى منتهاه، وما في تركيب خلقكم من العجائب «أفلا تبصرون» ذلك فتستدلون به على صانعه وقدرته
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَفِيٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan juga pada diri kalian sendiri) terdapat pula tanda-tanda yang menunjukkan kekuasaan dan keesaan-Nya, yaitu mulai dari permulaan penciptaan kalian hingga akhirnya, dan di dalam susunan penciptaan kalian terkandung pula keajaiban-keajaiban. (Maka apakah kalian tidak memperhatikan?) akan hal tersebut yang karena itu lalu kalian dapat menyimpulkan akan Penciptanya dan kekuasaan-Nya yang Maha Besar

ar: وَفِی ٱلسَّمَاۤءِ رِزۡقُكُمۡ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
ar_simple: وفی ٱلسماء رزقكم وما توعدون

t.sahih-int: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised
t.asad: And in heaven is [the source of] your sustenance [on earth] and [of] all that you are promised [for your life after death]
t.yusuf-ali: And in heaven is your Sustenance, as (also) that which ye are promised
t.pickthall: And in the heaven is your providence and that which ye are promised
t.arberry: And in heaven is your provision, and that you are promised
t.hilali-khan: And in the heaven is your provision, and that which you are promised
t.itani: And in the heaven is your livelihood, and what you are promised.
t.mubarakpuri: And in the heaven is your provision, and that which you are promised.
t.qarib: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised
t.wahiduddin: In heaven is your sustenance, and also that which you are promised
t.shakir: And in the heaven is your sustenance and what you are threatened with
t.haleem: in the sky is your sustenance and all that you are promised
t.maariful: And in the heavens, there is your sustenance and all that you have been promised
t.khattab: In heaven is your sustenance and whatever you are promised
t.ghali: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised
t.irving: In the sky is your sustenance and whatever you are promised
t.iwq: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised

t_id.kemenag: Dan di langit terdapat (sebab-sebab) rezekimu dan terdapat (pula) apa yang dijanjikan kepadamu.
t_id.sabiq: Dan di langit terdapat rezeki kalian dan ketentuan yang telah dijanjikan kepada kalian.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan di langit terdapat rezeki kalian) yaitu hujan yang menyebabkan tumbuhnya tumbuh-tumbuhan sebagai rezeki (dan terdapat pula apa yang dijanjikan kepada kalian) yakni tempat kembali, pahala, dan siksaan. Catatan mengenai hal tersebut terdapat di langit.
t_id.iwq: Dan di langit terdapat (sebab-sebab) rezekimu dan terdapat (pula) apa yang dijanjikan kepadamu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وفي السماء رزقكم» أي المطر المسبب عنه النبات الذي هو رزق «وما توعدون» من المآب والثواب والعقاب أي مكتوب ذلك في السماء
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَفِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقُكُمۡ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan di langit terdapat rezeki kalian) yaitu hujan yang menyebabkan tumbuhnya tumbuh-tumbuhan sebagai rezeki (dan terdapat pula apa yang dijanjikan kepada kalian) yakni tempat kembali, pahala, dan siksaan. Catatan mengenai hal tersebut terdapat di langit

ar: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَاۤءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقࣱّ مِّثۡلَ مَاۤ أَنَّكُمۡ تَنطِقُونَ
ar_simple: فورب ٱلسماء وٱلأرض إنه لحق مثل ما أنكم تنطقون

t.sahih-int: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking
t.asad: for, by the Sustainer of heaven and earth, this [life after death] is the very truth - as true as that you are endowed with speech
t.yusuf-ali: Then, by the Lord of heaven and earth, this is the very Truth, as much as the fact that ye can speak intelligently to each other
t.pickthall: And by the Lord of the heavens and the earth, it is the truth, even as (it is true) that ye speak
t.arberry: So by the Lord of heaven and earth, it is as surely true as that you have speech
t.hilali-khan: Then, by the Lord of the heaven and the earth, it is the truth (i.e. what has been promised to you), just as it is the truth that you can speak
t.itani: By the Lord of the heaven and the earth, it is as true as the fact that you speak.
t.mubarakpuri: Then by the Lord of the heaven and the earth, it is the truth, just as you can speak.
t.qarib: By the Lord of the heaven and earth, it is as true as the fact that you speak
t.wahiduddin: By the Lord of the heaven and the earth, it is certainly the truth. It is as true as your ability to speak
t.shakir: And by the Lord of the heavens and the earth! it is most surely the truth, just as you do speak
t.haleem: By the Lord of the heavens and earth! All this is as real as your speaking
t.maariful: So, by the Lord of the heavens and the earth, it (the Day of Recompense) is a reality, as sure as the fact that you (can) speak
t.khattab: Then by the Lord of heaven and earth! ˹All˺ this is certainly as true as ˹the fact that˺ you can speak
t.ghali: So by The Lord of the heaven and the earth, surely it is indeed true as (it is true) that you (can) pronounce (your languages)
t.irving: so by the Lord of Heaven and Earth, it is the Truth just the same as you have been uttering
t.iwq: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as sure as it is that you are speaking

t_id.kemenag: Maka demi Tuhan langit dan bumi, sesungguhnya yang dijanjikan itu adalah benar-benar (akan terjadi) seperti perkataan yang kamu ucapkan.
t_id.sabiq: Maka, demi langit dan bumi, aku bersumpah bahwa sesungguhnya semua yang kalian ingkari seperti terjadinya kebangkitan, pembalasan, pemberian siksa kepada orang-orang yang mendustakan dan pahala untuk orang-orang yang bertakwa benar-benar akan terjadi seperti halnya omongan yang tidak diragukan terjadinya dari kalian itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka demi Rabb langit dan bumi, sesungguhnya ia) yakni apa yang dijanjikan kepada kalian (adalah benar seperti perkataan yang kalian ucapkan) di-rafa-kannya lafal Mitslu karena menjadi sifat, sedangkan huruf Maa yang sesudahnya adalah Zaidah. Bila dibaca Mitsla maka tulisannya disatukan dengan Maa. Maknanya, kenyataannya seperti perkataan yang kalian ucapkan, yakni pengetahuan mengenai hal itu sudah dimaklumi oleh kalian, dan hal itu justru timbul dari diri kalian sendiri.
t_id.iwq: Maka demi Tuhan langit dan bumi, sesungguhnya yang dijanjikan itu adalah benar-benar (akan terjadi) seperti perkataan yang kamu ucapkan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فورب السماء والأرض إنه» أي ما توعدون «لحق مثلُ ما أنكم تنطقون» برفع مثل صفة، وما مزيدة وبفتح اللام مركبة مع ما، المعنى: مثل نطقكم في حقيقته أي معلوميته عندكم ضرورة صدوره عنكم
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقّٞ مِّثۡلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمۡ تَنطِقُونَ (إِنَّهُ لَحَقٌّ: إِنَّ مَا وَعَدَكُمْ بِهِ مِنَ الجَزَاءِ لَحَقٌّ ثَابِتٌ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka demi Rabb langit dan bumi, sesungguhnya ia) yakni apa yang dijanjikan kepada kalian (adalah benar seperti perkataan yang kalian ucapkan) di-rafa-kannya lafal Mitslu karena menjadi sifat, sedangkan huruf Maa yang sesudahnya adalah Zaidah. Bila dibaca Mitsla maka tulisannya disatukan dengan Maa. Maknanya, kenyataannya seperti perkataan yang kalian ucapkan, yakni pengetahuan mengenai hal itu sudah dimaklumi oleh kalian, dan hal itu justru timbul dari diri kalian sendiri

ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِیثُ ضَیۡفِ إِبۡرَ ٰهِیمَ ٱلۡمُكۡرَمِینَ
ar_simple: هل أتىك حدیث ضیف إبر هیم ٱلمكرمین

t.sahih-int: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham
t.asad: AND HAS the story of Abraham’s honoured guests ever come within thy ken
t.yusuf-ali: Has the story reached thee, of the honoured guests of Abraham
t.pickthall: Hath the story of Abraham's honoured guests reached thee (O Muhammad)
t.arberry: Hast thou received the story of the honoured guests of Abraham
t.hilali-khan: Has the story reached you, of the honoured guests [three angels; Jibrael (Gabriel) along with another two] of Ibrahim (Abraham)
t.itani: Has the story of Abraham’s honorable guests reached you?
t.mubarakpuri: Has the story reached you, of the honored guests of Ibrahim
t.qarib: Has the story of Abraham's honored guests reached you
t.wahiduddin: Have you heard the story of Abraham's honoured guests
t.shakir: Has there come to you information about the honored guests of Ibrahim
t.haleem: [Muhammad], have you heard the story of the honoured guests of Abraham
t.maariful: Has there come to you the story of the honoured guests of Ibrāhīm
t.khattab: Has the story of Abraham’s honoured guests reached you ˹O Prophet˺
t.ghali: Has the discourse about Ibrahim's (Abraham) honored guests come up (to your knowledge)
t.irving: Has the report of Abraham´s honored guests ever come to you
t.iwq: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham

t_id.kemenag: Sudahkah sampai kepadamu (Muhammad) cerita tentang tamu Ibrahim (yaitu malaikat-malaikat) yang dimuliakan?
t_id.sabiq: Tahukah kamu tentang kisah para malaikat yang menjadi tamu terhormat Nabi Ibrâhîm. Ketika masuk, para malaikat itu mengucapkan, "Salam sejahtera." Ibrâhîm pun menjawab, "Salam sejahtera. Kalian adalah orang-orang yang tak dikenal."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sudahkah sampai kepadamu) khithab ini ditujukan kepada Nabi saw. (cerita tamu Ibrahim yang dimuliakan) mereka adalah malaikat-malaikat yang jumlahnya ada dua belas atau sepuluh atau tiga malaikat; di antara mereka terdapat malaikat Jibril.
t_id.iwq: Sudahkah sampai kepadamu (Muhammad) cerita tentang tamu Ibrahim (yaitu malaikat-malaikat) yang dimuliakan?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «هل أتاك» خطاب للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم «حديث ضيف إبراهيم المكرمين» وهم ملائكة اثنا عشر أو عشرة أو ثلاثة، منهم جبريل
tafsir.siraj-ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيۡفِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ ٱلۡمُكۡرَمِينَ (ضَيْفِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ: أَضْيَافِهِ مِنَ المَلَائِكَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sudahkah sampai kepadamu) khithab ini ditujukan kepada Nabi saw. (cerita tamu Ibrahim yang dimuliakan) mereka adalah malaikat-malaikat yang jumlahnya ada dua belas atau sepuluh atau tiga malaikat; di antara mereka terdapat malaikat Jibril

ar: إِذۡ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَیۡهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمࣰاۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمࣱ قَوۡمࣱ مُّنكَرُونَ
ar_simple: إذ دخلوا علیه فقالوا سلما قال سلم قوم منكرون

t.sahih-int: When they entered upon him and said, "[We greet you with] peace." He answered, "[And upon you] peace, [you are] a people unknown
t.asad: When those [heavenly messengers] came unto him and bade him peace, he answered, “[And upon you be] peace!” - [saying to himself,] “They are strangers.”
t.yusuf-ali: Behold, they entered his presence, and said: "Peace!" He said, "Peace!" (and thought, "These seem) unusual people
t.pickthall: When they came in unto him and said: Peace! he answered, Peace! (and thought): Folk unknown (to me)
t.arberry: When they entered unto him, saying 'Peace!' he said 'Peace! You are a people unknown to me
t.hilali-khan: When they came in to him, and said, "Salam, (peace be upon you)!" He answered; "Salam, (peace be upon you)," and said: "You are a people unknown to me
t.itani: When they entered upon him, they said, “Peace.” He said, “Peace, strangers.”
t.mubarakpuri: When they came in to him and said: "Salaman!" He answered: "Salamun" and said: "You are a people unknown to me."
t.qarib: When they entered to see him, they said, "Peace." He answered, "Peace to you strangers
t.wahiduddin: When they came to him they said, "Peace!" He answered, "Peace!" [saying to himself]. "They are strangers
t.shakir: When they entered upon him, they said: Peace. Peace, said he, a strange people
t.haleem: They went in to see him and said, ‘Peace.’ ‘Peace,’ he said, [adding to himself] ‘These people are strangers.’
t.maariful: When they (the angels in human form) entered unto him and said, “We greet you with Salām .” He said, “Salām on you.” (And he said to himself,) “(They are) unknown people.”
t.khattab: ˹Remember˺ when they entered his presence and greeted ˹him with˺, “Peace!” He replied, “Peace ˹be upon you˺!” ˹Then he said to himself,˺ “˹These are˺ an unfamiliar people.”
t.ghali: As they entered to him, then they said, "Peace!" He said, "Peace! (You) are a people disclaimed (by me)." (i.e., not recognized by me)
t.irving: when they entered his home and said: "Peace [be upon you]!"? He said: "[On you be] peace!" [even though] they were people he did not know
t.iwq: When they entered upon him and said, "We greet you with peace." He answered, "And upon you peace, you are a people unknown

t_id.kemenag: (Ingatlah) ketika mereka masuk ke tempatnya lalu mengucapkan: "Salaamun". Ibrahim menjawab: "Salaamun (kamu) adalah orang-orang yang tidak dikenal".
t_id.sabiq: Tahukah kamu tentang kisah para malaikat yang menjadi tamu terhormat Nabi Ibrâhîm. Ketika masuk, para malaikat itu mengucapkan, "Salam sejahtera." Ibrâhîm pun menjawab, "Salam sejahtera. Kalian adalah orang-orang yang tak dikenal."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ketika) lafal Idz di sini berkedudukan menjadi Zharaf bagi lafal Hadiitsu Dhaifi Ibraahiima (mereka masuk ke tempatnya lalu mengucapkan, "Salaaman") tamu-tamu itu mengucapkan perkataan tersebut. (Ibrahim menjawab, "Salaamun") menjawab dengan ucapan yang sama (mereka adalah orang-orang yang tidak dikenal) maksudnya, kami tidak mengenal mereka, Nabi Ibrahim mengatakan ucapan ini di dalam hatinya. Kalimat ini berkedudukan menjadi Khabar dari Mubtada yang keberadaannya diperkirakan, yaitu lafal Haa`ulaa`i yang artinya mereka.
t_id.iwq: (Ingatlah) ketika mereka masuk ke tempatnya lalu mengucapkan: "Salaamun". Ibrahim menjawab: "Salaamun (kamu) adalah orang-orang yang tidak dikenal".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ» ظرف لحديث ضيف «دخلوا عليه فقالوا سلاما» أي هذا اللفظ «قال سلام» أي هذا اللفظ «قوم منكرون» لا نعرفهم قال ذلك في نفسه وهو خبر مبتدأ مقدر أي هؤلاء
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُواْ سَلَٰمٗاۖ قَالَ سَلَٰمٞ قَوۡمٞ مُّنكَرُونَ (مُّنكَرُونَ: غُرَبَاءُ لَا تُعْرَفُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ketika) lafal Idz di sini berkedudukan menjadi Zharaf bagi lafal Hadiitsu Dhaifi Ibraahiima (mereka masuk ke tempatnya lalu mengucapkan, "Salaaman") tamu-tamu itu mengucapkan perkataan tersebut. (Ibrahim menjawab, "Salaamun") menjawab dengan ucapan yang sama (mereka adalah orang-orang yang tidak dikenal) maksudnya, kami tidak mengenal mereka, Nabi Ibrahim mengatakan ucapan ini di dalam hatinya. Kalimat ini berkedudukan menjadi Khabar dari Mubtada yang keberadaannya diperkirakan, yaitu lafal Haa`ulaa`i yang artinya mereka

ar: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰۤ أَهۡلِهِۦ فَجَاۤءَ بِعِجۡلࣲ سَمِینࣲ
ar_simple: فراغ إلى أهله فجاء بعجل سمین

t.sahih-int: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf
t.asad: Then he turned quietly to his household, and brought forth a fat [roasted] calf
t.yusuf-ali: Then he turned quickly to his household, brought out a fatted calf
t.pickthall: Then he went apart unto his housefolk so that they brought a fatted calf
t.arberry: Then he turned to his household and brought a fattened calf
t.hilali-khan: Then he turned to his household, so brought out a roasted calf [as the property of Ibrahim (Abraham) was mainly cows
t.itani: Then he slipped away to his family, and brought a fatted calf.
t.mubarakpuri: Then he turned to his household, and brought out a roasted calf.
t.qarib: Then he went off to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf
t.wahiduddin: Then he turned quickly to his household, and brought a fatted calf
t.shakir: Then he turned aside to his family secretly and brought a fat (roasted) calf
t.haleem: He turned quickly to his household, brought out a fat calf
t.maariful: Then he slipped off to his home and fetched a fattened calf
t.khattab: Then he slipped off to his family and brought a fat ˹roasted˺ calf
t.ghali: So he went apart to his family, then came with a plump calf
t.irving: So he slipped off to his family and fetched a fattened calf
t.iwq: Then he went to his family and came with a fat roasted calf

t_id.kemenag: Maka dia pergi dengan diam-diam menemui keluarganya, kemudian dibawanya daging anak sapi gemuk.
t_id.sabiq: Ibrâhîm pergi menemui isterinya dengan diam-diam. Kemudian ia datang dengan membawa daging anak sapi yang gemuk. Daging itu pun didekatkan kepada mereka. Tetapi mereka tidak memakannya. Dengan nada menolak sikap mereka, Ibrâhîm berkata, "Silahkan kalian makan?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka dia pergi) yakni ia beranjak dari situ (menemui keluarganya) dengan diam-diam (kemudian dibawanya daging anak sapi yang gemuk). Di dalam surah Hud telah disebutkan pula melalui firman-Nya, "... dengan membawa daging anak sapi yang dipanggang." (Q.S. Hud, 69) yakni daging anak sapi gemuk itu sudah dipanggang.
t_id.iwq: Maka dia pergi dengan diam-diam menemui keluarganya, kemudian dibawanya daging anak sapi gemuk.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: (فراغ) مال (إلى أهله) سرا (فجاء بعجل سمين) وفي سورة هود "" بعجل حنيذ "" أي مشوي
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجۡلٖ سَمِينٖ (فَرَاغَ: مَالَ، وَعَدَلَ بِخُفْيَةٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka dia pergi) yakni ia beranjak dari situ (menemui keluarganya) dengan diam-diam (kemudian dibawanya daging anak sapi yang gemuk). Di dalam surah Hud telah disebutkan pula melalui firman-Nya, "... dengan membawa daging anak sapi yang dipanggang." (Q.S. Hud, 69) yakni daging anak sapi gemuk itu sudah dipanggang

ar: فَقَرَّبَهُۥۤ إِلَیۡهِمۡ قَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
ar_simple: فقربه إلیهم قال ألا تأكلون

t.sahih-int: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat
t.asad: and placed it before them, saying, “Will you not eat?”
t.yusuf-ali: And placed it before them.. he said, "Will ye not eat
t.pickthall: And he set it before them, saying: Will ye not eat
t.arberry: and he laid it before them saying, 'Will you not eat
t.hilali-khan: And placed it before them, (saying): "Will you not eat
t.itani: He set it before them. He said, “Will you not eat?”
t.mubarakpuri: And placed it before them (saying): "Will you not eat"
t.qarib: and placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat
t.wahiduddin: and placed it before them. "Will you not eat?" he said
t.shakir: So he brought it near them. He said: What! will you not eat
t.haleem: and placed it before them. ‘Will you not eat?’ he said
t.maariful: So he presented it before them (to eat, but being angels, they refrained.) He said, “Would you not eat?”
t.khattab: and placed it before them, asking, “Will you not eat?”
t.ghali: So he laid it near them and said, "Will you not eat

t.iwq: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat

t_id.kemenag: Lalu dihidangkannya kepada mereka. Ibrahim lalu berkata: "Silahkan anda makan".
t_id.sabiq: Ibrâhîm pergi menemui isterinya dengan diam-diam. Kemudian ia datang dengan membawa daging anak sapi yang gemuk. Daging itu pun didekatkan kepada mereka. Tetapi mereka tidak memakannya. Dengan nada menolak sikap mereka, Ibrâhîm berkata, "Silahkan kalian makan?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu dihidangkannya kepada mereka. Ibrahim berkata, "Silakan kalian makan") Nabi Ibrahim mempersilakan mereka untuk makan, tetapi mereka tidak mau memakannya.
t_id.iwq: Lalu dihidangkannya kepada mereka. Ibrahim lalu berkata: "Silahkan anda makan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فقربه إليهم قال ألا تأكلون» عرض عليهم الأكل فلم يجيبوا
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيۡهِمۡ قَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lalu dihidangkannya kepada mereka. Ibrahim berkata, "Silakan kalian makan") Nabi Ibrahim mempersilakan mereka untuk makan, tetapi mereka tidak mau memakannya

ar: فَأَوۡجَسَ مِنۡهُمۡ خِیفَةࣰۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفۡۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِیمࣲ
ar_simple: فأوجس منهم خیفة قالوا لا تخف وبشروه بغلم علیم

t.sahih-int: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy
t.asad: [And when he saw that the guests would not eat,] he became apprehensive of them; [but] they said, “Fear not” - and gave him the glad tiding of [the birth of] a son who would be endowed with deep knowledge
t.yusuf-ali: (When they did not eat), He conceived a fear of them. They said, "Fear not," and they gave him glad tidings of a son endowed with knowledge
t.pickthall: Then he conceived a fear of them. They said: Fear not! and gave him tidings of (the birth of) a wise son
t.arberry: Then he conceived a fear of them. They said, 'Be not afraid!' And they gave him good tidings of a cunning boy
t.hilali-khan: Then he conceived a fear of them (when they ate not). They said: "Fear not." And they gave him glad tidings of an intelligent son, having knowledge (about Allah and His religion of True Monotheism)
t.itani: And he harbored fear of them. They said, “Do not fear,” and they announced to him the good news of a knowledgeable boy.
t.mubarakpuri: Then he conceived fear of them (when they ate not). They said: "Fear not." And they gave him glad tidings of a son having knowledge.
t.qarib: He then began to feel apprehensive. They said, "Do not fear," and gave him good news of a boy who would be gifted with knowledge
t.wahiduddin: beginning to be afraid of them. But they said, "Don't be afraid"; and they gave him the good news of a son who would be endowed with knowledge
t.shakir: So he conceived in his mind a fear on account of them. They said: Fear not. And they gave him the good news of a boy possessing knowledge
t.haleem: beginning to be afraid of them, but they said, ‘Do not be afraid.’ They gave him good news of a son who would be gifted with knowledge
t.maariful: So he felt some fear in his heart. They said, “Be not scared.” And they gave him the good news of (the birth of) a knowledgeable boy
t.khattab: ˹They did not eat,˺ so he grew fearful of them. They reassured ˹him˺, “Do not be afraid,” and gave him good news of a knowledgeable son
t.ghali: Then he entertained a fright of them. They said, "Do not fear (anything)." And they gave him good tidings of a knowledgeable youth
t.irving: He felt a fear concerning them. They said: "Don´t be afraid," and gave him the news of a clever lad
t.iwq: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy

t_id.kemenag: (Tetapi mereka tidak mau makan), karena itu Ibrahim merasa takut terhadap mereka. Mereka berkata: "Janganlah kamu takut", dan mereka memberi kabar gembira kepadanya dengan (kelahiran) seorang anak yang alim (Ishak).
t_id.sabiq: Lalu, di dalam dirinya, ia merasa takut dengan mereka. Para malaikat itu pun berkata, "Jangan takut!" Mereka pun lalu memberikan kabar gembira kepadanya berupa kedatangan seorang anak yang sangat cerdas.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka Ibrahim memendam) di dalam hatinya (rasa takut terhadap mereka. Mereka berkata, "Janganlah kamu takut") sesungguhnya kami adalah utusan-utusan Rabbmu (dan mereka memberi kabar gembira dengan kelahiran seorang anak yang alim) yakni anak yang mempunyai ilmu banyak yaitu, Nabi Ishak sebagaimana yang telah disebutkan di dalam surah Hud.
t_id.iwq: (Tetapi mereka tidak mau makan), karena itu Ibrahim merasa takut terhadap mereka. Mereka berkata: "Janganlah kamu takut", dan mereka memberi kabar gembira kepadanya dengan (kelahiran) seorang anak yang alim (Ishak).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأوجس» أضمر في نفسه «منهم خيفة قالوا لا تخف» إنا رسل ربك «وبشروه بغلام عليم» ذي علم كثير وهو إسحاق كما ذكر في هود
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَوۡجَسَ مِنۡهُمۡ خِيفَةٗۖ قَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٖ (فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ: أَحَسَّ فِي نَفْسِهِ مِنْهُمِ, بِغُلَامٍ: هُوَ: إِسْحَاقُ - عليه السلام)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka Ibrahim memendam) di dalam hatinya (rasa takut terhadap mereka. Mereka berkata, "Janganlah kamu takut") sesungguhnya kami adalah utusan-utusan Rabbmu (dan mereka memberi kabar gembira dengan kelahiran seorang anak yang alim) yakni anak yang mempunyai ilmu banyak yaitu, Nabi Ishak sebagaimana yang telah disebutkan di dalam surah Hud

ar: فَأَقۡبَلَتِ ٱمۡرَأَتُهُۥ فِی صَرَّةࣲ فَصَكَّتۡ وَجۡهَهَا وَقَالَتۡ عَجُوزٌ عَقِیمࣱ
ar_simple: فأقبلت ٱمرأته فی صرة فصكت وجهها وقالت عجوز عقیم

t.sahih-int: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, "[I am] a barren old woman
t.asad: Thereupon his wife approached [the guests] with a loud cry, and struck her face [in astonishment] and exclaimed: “A barren old woman [like me]!”
t.yusuf-ali: But his wife came forward (laughing) aloud: she smote her forehead and said: "A barren old woman
t.pickthall: Then his wife came forward, making moan, and smote her face, and cried: A barren old woman
t.arberry: Then came forward his wife, clamouring, and she smote her face, and said, 'An old woman, barren
t.hilali-khan: Then his wife came forward with a loud voice, she smote her face, and said: "A barren old woman
t.itani: His wife came forward crying. She clasped her face, and said, “A barren old woman?”
t.mubarakpuri: Then his wife came forward with a loud voice; she smote her face, and said: "A barren old woman!"
t.qarib: His wife approached with a scream, struck her face and protested, "A barren old woman [like me]
t.wahiduddin: Then his wife came forward, crying and beating her brow. She said, "I am surely a barren, old woman
t.shakir: Then his wife came up in great grief, and she struck her face and said: An old barren woman
t.haleem: His wife then entered with a loud cry, struck her face, and said, ‘A barren old woman?’
t.maariful: So his wife came forward with a clamor, and slapped her own face and said, “(How can I have a child when I am) a barren old woman?”
t.khattab: Then his wife came forward with a cry, clasping her forehead ˹in astonishment˺, exclaiming, “˹A baby from˺ a barren, old woman!”
t.ghali: So came forward his wife, clamoring; (literally: with a clamor) then she beat her face, and said, "An old sterile woman
t.irving: His wife came up sighing, and struck her face and said: "[I´m] a barren old hag
t.iwq: And his wife approached with a cry of alarm and struck her face and said, "I am a barren old woman

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian isterinya datang memekik lalu menepuk mukanya sendiri seraya berkata: "(Aku adalah) seorang perempuan tua yang mandul".
t_id.sabiq: Ketika mendengar berita gembira itu, istrinya datang memekik lalu menepuk mukanya sendiri karena tercengang dan heran seraya berkata, "Aku adalah seorang perempuan tua yang mandul, bagaimana mungkin dapat melahirkan?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian istrinya datang) yakni Siti Sarah (seraya memekik) karena tercengang, berkedudukan menjadi Hal; yakni Siti Sarah datang seraya memekik karena kaget (lalu menepuk mukanya sendiri) menampar mukanya sendiri (seraya berkata, "Aku adalah seorang perempuan tua yang mandul") yang tidak dapat melahirkan anak sama sekali, pada saat itu umur Sarah mencapai sembilan puluh sembilan tahun, sedangkan Nabi Ibrahim seratus tahun; atau umur Nabi Ibrahim pada saat itu seratus dua puluh tahun, sedangkan umur Siti Sarah sembilan puluh tahun.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian isterinya datang memekik lalu menepuk mukanya sendiri seraya berkata: "(Aku adalah) seorang perempuan tua yang mandul".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأقبلت امراته» سارة «في صرَّة» صيحة حال، أي جاءت صائحة «فصكت وجهها» لطمته «وقالت عجوز عقيم» لم تلد قط وعمرها تسع وتسعون سنة وعمر إبراهيم مائة سنة، أو عمره مائة وعشرون سنة وعمرها تسعون سنة
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَقۡبَلَتِ ٱمۡرَأَتُهُۥ فِي صَرَّةٖ فَصَكَّتۡ وَجۡهَهَا وَقَالَتۡ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٞ (امْرَأَتُهُ: هِيَ: سَارَةُ, صَرَّةٍ: صَيْحَةٍ، وَضَجَّةٍ, فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا: لَطَمَتْهُ بِيَدِهَا تَعَجُّبًا, عَقِيمٌ: لَا يُولَدُ لِي وَلَدٌ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian istrinya datang) yakni Siti Sarah (seraya memekik) karena tercengang, berkedudukan menjadi Hal; yakni Siti Sarah datang seraya memekik karena kaget (lalu menepuk mukanya sendiri) menampar mukanya sendiri (seraya berkata, "Aku adalah seorang perempuan tua yang mandul") yang tidak dapat melahirkan anak sama sekali, pada saat itu umur Sarah mencapai sembilan puluh sembilan tahun, sedangkan Nabi Ibrahim seratus tahun; atau umur Nabi Ibrahim pada saat itu seratus dua puluh tahun, sedangkan umur Siti Sarah sembilan puluh tahun

ar: قَالُوا۟ كَذَ ٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡحَكِیمُ ٱلۡعَلِیمُ
ar_simple: قالوا كذ لك قال ربك إنه هو ٱلحكیم ٱلعلیم

t.sahih-int: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing
t.asad: They answered: “Thus has thy Sustainer decreed; and, verily, He alone is truly wise, all- knowing!”
t.yusuf-ali: They said, "Even so has thy Lord spoken: and He is full of Wisdom and Knowledge
t.pickthall: They said: Even so saith thy Lord. Lo! He is the Wise, the Knower
t.arberry: They said, 'So says thy Lord; He is the All-wise, the All-knowing
t.hilali-khan: They said: "Even so says your Lord. Verily, He is the All-Wise, the All-Knower
t.itani: They said, “Thus spoke your Lord. He is the Wise, the Knowing.”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "Even so says your Lord. Verily, He is the All-Wise, the All-Knower."
t.qarib: They said, "Thus said your Lord; He is the All-Wise, the All-knowing
t.wahiduddin: Such is the will of your Lord," they replied. "He is the Wise, the All Knowing
t.shakir: They said: Thus says your Lord: Surely He is the Wise, the Knowing
t.haleem: but they said, ‘It will be so. This is what your Lord said, and He is the Wise, the All Knowing.’
t.maariful: They said, “This is how your Lord has said. Surely, He is All-Wise, All-Knowing.”
t.khattab: They replied, “Such has your Lord decreed. He is truly the All-Wise, All-Knowing.”
t.ghali: They said, "Thus your Lord has said; surely He, Ever He, is The Ever-Wise, The Ever-Knowing
t.irving: They said: "Even so did your Lord say. He is the Wise, the Aware
t.iwq: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; verily, He is the Wise, the Knowing

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata: "Demikianlah Tuhanmu memfirmankan" Sesungguhnya Dialah yang Maha Bijaksana lagi Maha Mengetahui.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka berkata, "Begitulah ketentuan Tuhanmu. Sesungguhnya Dia Mahabijaksana dalam menentukan segala sesuatu, lagi Maha Mengetahui."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Demikianlah) sebagaimana perkataan kami tentang berita gembira ini (Rabbmu memfirmankan". Sesungguhnya Dialah Yang Maha Bijaksana) di dalam perbuatan-Nya (lagi Maha Mengetahui) tentang makhluk-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata: "Demikianlah Tuhanmu memfirmankan" Sesungguhnya Dialah yang Maha Bijaksana lagi Maha Mengetahui.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا كذلك» أي مثل قولنا في البشارة «قال ربك إنه هو الحكيم» في صنعه «العليم» بخلقه
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Demikianlah) sebagaimana perkataan kami tentang berita gembira ini (Rabbmu memfirmankan". Sesungguhnya Dialah Yang Maha Bijaksana) di dalam perbuatan-Nya (lagi Maha Mengetahui) tentang makhluk-Nya

ar: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ أَیُّهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
ar_simple: قال فما خطبكم أیها ٱلمرسلون

t.sahih-int: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers
t.asad: Said [Abraham]: “And what [else] may you have in view, O you [heavenly] messengers?”
t.yusuf-ali: (Abraham) said: "And what, O ye Messengers, is your errand (now)
t.pickthall: (Abraham) said: And (afterward) what is your errand, O ye sent (from Allah)
t.arberry: Said he, 'And what is your business, envoys
t.hilali-khan: Ibrahim (Abraham)] said: "Then for what purpose you have come, O Messengers
t.itani: He said, “What is your business, O envoys?”
t.mubarakpuri: (Ibrahim) said: "Then for what purpose you have come, O messengers"
t.qarib: [Abraham] then enquired, "What is your business, messengers
t.wahiduddin: Abraham asked, "What is your errand, O messengers
t.shakir: He said: What is your affair then, O apostles
t.haleem: Abraham said, ‘What is your errand, messengers?’
t.maariful: He (Ibrāhīm) said (to the angels), “Then, what is your mission O messengers?”
t.khattab: ˹Later,˺ Abraham asked, “What is your mission, O messengers?”
t.ghali: Said he, "So, what is your concern, you Emissaries
t.irving: He said: "Yet what is your errand, 0 emissaries
t.iwq: Abraham said, "Then what is your business here, O messengers

t_id.kemenag: Ibrahim bertanya: "Apakah urusanmu hai para utusan?"
t_id.sabiq: Ibrâhîm berkata, "Apakah urusan kalian, setelah berita gembira ini, wahai para utusan?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ibrahim bertanya, "Apakah urusan kalian) maksudnya, kepentingan kalian (hai para utusan?");
t_id.iwq: Ibrahim bertanya: "Apakah urusanmu hai para utusan?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال فما خطبكم» شأنكم «أيها المرسلون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: ۞قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ (فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ: مَا شَانُكُمْ؟)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ibrahim bertanya, "Apakah urusan kalian) maksudnya, kepentingan kalian (hai para utusan)

t.yusuf-ali: They said, "We have been sent to a people (deep) in sin

t.arberry: They said, 'We have been sent to a people of sinners

t.mubarakpuri: They said: "We have been sent to a people who are criminals."
t.qarib: They said, " We have been sent to a dissenting people
t.wahiduddin: They replied, "We have been sent to a sinful people
t.shakir: They said: Surely we are sent to a guilty people
t.haleem: They said, ‘We are sent to a people lost in sin
t.maariful: They said, “We are sent to a guilty people, (i.e. the people of Sodom)
t.khattab: They replied, “We have actually been sent to a wicked people
t.ghali: They said, "Surely we have been sent to a criminal people
t.irving: They said: "We have been sent to a criminal folk
t.iwq: And they said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals

t_id.kemenag: Mereka menjawab: "Sesungguhnya kami diutus kepada kaum yang berdosa (kaum Luth),
