tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Agar kami timpakan kepada mereka batu-batu dari tanah yang keras) yang dibakar oleh api

ar: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُسۡرِفِینَ
ar_simple: مسومة عند ربك للمسرفین

t.sahih-int: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors
t.asad: marked out in thy Sustainer’s sight for [the punishment of] such as have wasted their own selves.”
t.yusuf-ali: Marked as from thy Lord for those who trespass beyond bounds
t.pickthall: Marked by thy Lord for (the destruction of) the wanton
t.arberry: marked with thy Lord for the prodigal
t.hilali-khan: Marked by your Lord for the Musrifun (polytheists, criminals, sinners those who trespass Allah's set limits in evil-doings by committing great sins)
t.itani: “Marked by your Lord for the excessive.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Marked by your Lord for transgressors."
t.qarib: marked by your Lord for those who rejected His messages and have severed all relations with God
t.wahiduddin: which are marked by your Lord for the punishment of those guilty of excesses
t.shakir: Sent forth from your Lord for the extravagant
t.haleem: marked by your Lord for those who exceed all bounds.’
t.maariful: marked by your Lord for the transgressors.”
t.khattab: marked by your Lord for the transgressors.”
t.ghali: Marked in the Reckoning of your Lord for the extravagant
t.irving: marked by your Lord for the dissipated
t.iwq: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors

t_id.kemenag: yang ditandai di sisi Tuhanmu untuk membinasakan orang-orang yang melampaui batas".
t_id.sabiq: Mereka menjawab, "Sesungguhnya kami diutus kepada suatu kaum yang keterlaluan dalam berbuat maksiat untuk melempar mereka dengan bebatuan yang hanya diketahui bentuknya oleh Allah. Bebatuan tersebut diberi tanda khusus dari Tuhanmu untuk orang-orang yang melampaui batas dalam kejahatan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yang ditandai) yang diberi tanda padanya nama orang-orang yang akan dilemparkan (di sisi Rabbmu) menjadi Zharaf dari lafal yang sebelumnya (untuk orang-orang yang melampaui batas") karena mereka gemar melakukan homosex, dan kekafiran mereka.
t_id.iwq: yang ditandai di sisi Tuhanmu untuk membinasakan orang-orang yang melampaui batas".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «مُسَوَّمة» معلمة عليها اسم من يْرمى بها «عند ربك» ظرف لها «للمسرفين» بإتيانهم الذكور مع كفرهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُسۡرِفِينَ (مُسَوَّمَةً: مُعَلَّمَةً بِأَنَّهَا لِعَذَابِ المُسْرِفِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yang ditandai) yang diberi tanda padanya nama orang-orang yang akan dilemparkan (di sisi Rabbmu) menjadi Zharaf dari lafal yang sebelumnya (untuk orang-orang yang melampaui batas") karena mereka gemar melakukan homosex, dan kekafiran mereka

ar: فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مَن كَانَ فِیهَا مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: فأخرجنا من كان فیها من ٱلمؤمنین

t.sahih-int: So We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers
t.asad: And in the course of time We brought out [of Lot ’s city] such [few] believers as were there
t.yusuf-ali: Then We evacuated those of the Believers who were there
t.pickthall: Then we brought forth such believers as were there
t.arberry: So We brought forth such believers as were in it
t.hilali-khan: So We brought out from therein the believers
t.itani: We evacuated all the believers who were in it.
t.mubarakpuri: So We brought out from therein the believers.
t.qarib: So We brought out the believers that were in town
t.wahiduddin: We saved all the faithful in the town
t.shakir: Then We brought forth such as were therein of the believers
t.haleem: We brought out such believers as were there
t.maariful: So, We let the believers who were there to come out (from danger)
t.khattab: Then ˹before the torment˺ We evacuated the believers from the city
t.ghali: Then We brought out whoever of the believers who were in it
t.irving: So We brought out anyone there who were believers
t.iwq: Thus We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers

t_id.kemenag: Lalu Kami keluarkan orang-orang yang beriman yang berada di negeri kaum Luth itu.
t_id.sabiq: Kami memutuskan untuk mengeluarkan orang-orang Mukmin yang ada di negeri itu hingga tidak Kami dapati di situ kecuali penghuni sebuah rumah yang berserah diri.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu Kami keluarkan orang-orang yang berada di negeri itu) kampung-kampung Nabi Luth (yakni orang-orang yang beriman) karena orang-orang kafirnya akan dibinasakan.
t_id.iwq: Lalu Kami keluarkan orang-orang yang beriman yang berada di negeri kaum Luth itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأخرجنا من كان فيها» أي قرى قوم لوط «من المؤمنين» لإهلاك الكافرين
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lalu Kami keluarkan orang-orang yang berada di negeri itu) kampung-kampung Nabi Luth (yakni orang-orang yang beriman) karena orang-orang kafirnya akan dibinasakan

ar: فَمَا وَجَدۡنَا فِیهَا غَیۡرَ بَیۡتࣲ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِینَ
ar_simple: فما وجدنا فیها غیر بیت من ٱلمسلمین

t.sahih-int: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims
t.asad: for apart from one [single] house We did not find there any who had surrendered themselves to Us
t.yusuf-ali: But We found not there any just (Muslim) persons except in one house
t.pickthall: But We found there but one house of those surrendered (to Allah)
t.arberry: but We found not therein except one house of those that have surrendered themselves
t.hilali-khan: But We found not there any household of the Muslims except one [i.e. Lout (Lot) and his two daughters
t.itani: But found in it only one household of Muslims.
t.mubarakpuri: But We found not there any household of the Muslims except one.
t.qarib: But found only one household of people who submitted to God
t.wahiduddin: We found in it only one household of true believers
t.shakir: But We did not find therein save a (single) house of those who submitted (the Muslims)
t.haleem: We found only one household devoted to God
t.maariful: but We did not find in it any Muslims, except one house
t.khattab: But We only found one family that had submitted ˹to Allah˺
t.ghali: Yet, in no way did We find therein other than one house of Muslims; (i.e., those who surrender themselves to Allah)
t.irving: though We found only one house with Muslims in it
t.iwq: And We found not within them other than a single house of Muslims

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami tidak mendapati negeri itu, kecuali sebuah rumah dari orang yang berserah diri.
t_id.sabiq: Kami memutuskan untuk mengeluarkan orang-orang Mukmin yang ada di negeri itu hingga tidak Kami dapati di situ kecuali penghuni sebuah rumah yang berserah diri.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami tidak mendapati di negeri itu, kecuali sebuah rumah dari orang-orang yang berserah diri) mereka adalah Nabi Luth dan kedua orang putrinya, mereka dinamakan sebagai orang-orang yang beriman dan berserah diri, karena mereka adalah orang-orang yang beriman dengan sepenuh kalbu serta mengamalkan ketaatan dengan semua anggota tubuh mereka.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami tidak mendapati negeri itu, kecuali sebuah rumah dari orang yang berserah diri.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فما وجدنا فيها غير بيت من المسلمين» وهو لوط وابنتاه وصفوا بالإيمان والإسلام، أي هم مصدقون بقلوبهم عاملون بجوارحهم الطاعات
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَمَا وَجَدۡنَا فِيهَا غَيۡرَ بَيۡتٖ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami tidak mendapati di negeri itu, kecuali sebuah rumah dari orang-orang yang berserah diri) mereka adalah Nabi Luth dan kedua orang putrinya, mereka dinamakan sebagai orang-orang yang beriman dan berserah diri, karena mereka adalah orang-orang yang beriman dengan sepenuh kalbu serta mengamalkan ketaatan dengan semua anggota tubuh mereka

ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا فِیهَاۤ ءَایَةࣰ لِّلَّذِینَ یَخَافُونَ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِیمَ
ar_simple: وتركنا فیها ءایة للذین یخافون ٱلعذاب ٱلألیم

t.sahih-int: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment
t.asad: And so We left therein a message for those who fear the grievous suffering [which awaits all evildoers]
t.yusuf-ali: And We left there a Sign for such as fear the Grievous Penalty
t.pickthall: And We left behind therein a portent for those who fear a painful doom
t.arberry: And therein We left a sign to those who fear the painful chastisement
t.hilali-khan: And We have left there a sign (i.e. the place of the Dead Sea, well-known in Palestine) for those who fear the painful torment
t.itani: And We left in it a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.
t.mubarakpuri: And We have left there a sign for those who fear the painful torment.
t.qarib: And We left in town a sign for those who fear the painful punishment
t.wahiduddin: and We left therein a sign for those who fear a painful punishment
t.shakir: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment
t.haleem: and left the town to be a sign for those who fear the painful punishment
t.maariful: And We left in this (event) a sign (of deterrence) for those who fear the painful punishment
t.khattab: And We have left a sign there ˹as a lesson˺ for those who fear the painful punishment
t.ghali: And We have left in it a sign to the ones who fear the painful torment
t.irving: We left a sign there for those who fear painful torment
t.iwq: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami tinggalkan pada negeri itu suatu tanda bagi orang-orang yang takut kepada siksa yang pedih.
t_id.sabiq: Kami tinggalkan di negeri itu tanda kehancuran penduduknya agar orang-orang yang takut akan siksa pedih dapat menjadikannya pelajaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami tinggalkan pada negeri itu) sesudah semua orang-orang kafir dibinasakan (suatu tanda) yakni tanda yang menunjukkan bahwa mereka telah dibinasakan (bagi orang-orang yang takut kepada siksa yang pedih) hingga hal itu dijadikan sebagai peringatan buat mereka, supaya mereka tidak melakukan perbuatan yang sama.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami tinggalkan pada negeri itu suatu tanda bagi orang-orang yang takut kepada siksa yang pedih.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وتركنا فيها» بعد إهلاك الكافرين «آية» علامة على إهلاكهم «للذين يخافون العذاب الأليم» فلا يفعلون مثل فعلهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةٗ لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ (فِيهَا آيَةً: فِي قَرْيَتِهِمْ أَثَرًا مِنَ العَذَابِ بَاقِيًا؛ عَلَامَةً عَلَى قُدْرَةِ اللهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami tinggalkan pada negeri itu) sesudah semua orang-orang kafir dibinasakan (suatu tanda) yakni tanda yang menunjukkan bahwa mereka telah dibinasakan (bagi orang-orang yang takut kepada siksa yang pedih) hingga hal itu dijadikan sebagai peringatan buat mereka, supaya mereka tidak melakukan perbuatan yang sama

ar: وَفِی مُوسَىٰۤ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِسُلۡطَـٰنࣲ مُّبِینࣲ
ar_simple: وفی موسى إذ أرسلنه إلى فرعون بسلطن مبین

t.sahih-int: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority
t.asad: AND IN [the story of Pharaoh and] Moses, too, [We left the same message: for] when We sent him unto Pharaoh with [Our] manifest authority
t.yusuf-ali: And in Moses (was another Sign): Behold, We sent him to Pharaoh, with authority manifest
t.pickthall: And in Moses (too, there is a portent) when We sent him unto Pharaoh with clear warrant
t.arberry: And also in Moses, when We sent him unto Pharaoh, with a clear authority
t.hilali-khan: And in Musa (Moses) (too, there is a sign). When We sent him to Fir'aun (Pharaoh) with a manifest authority
t.itani: And in Moses. We sent him to Pharaoh with a clear authority.
t.mubarakpuri: And in Musa, when We sent him to Fir`awn with a manifest authority.
t.qarib: There is another sign in Moses, when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority
t.wahiduddin: There is another sign in Moses: We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority
t.shakir: And in Musa: When We sent him to Firon with clear authority
t.haleem: There is another sign in Moses: We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority
t.maariful: And (We left a similar sign) in (the story of) Mūsā, when We sent him to Fir‘aun (Pharaoh) with a clear proof
t.khattab: And in ˹the story of˺ Moses ˹was another lesson,˺ when We sent him to Pharaoh with compelling proof
t.ghali: And (also there is a sign) in Musa (Moses) as We sent him to Firaawn (pharaoh) with an evident, all- binding authority
t.irving: And with Moses when We sent him off with clear authority to Pharaoh
t.iwq: And in Moses was a sign, when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority

t_id.kemenag: Dan juga pada Musa (terdapat tanda-tanda kekuasaan Allah) ketika Kami mengutusnya kepada Fir'aun dengan membawa mukjizat yang nyata.
t_id.sabiq: Dalam kisah Nabi Mýûsâ juga terdapat pelajaran. Yaitu ketika Kami mengutusnya dengan didukung oleh bukti yang jelas.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan juga pada Musa) di-'athaf-kan kepada lafal Fiihaa. Maknanya, Dan Kami jadikan pada kisah Musa suatu tanda (ketika Kami mengutusnya kepada Firaun) (dengan membawa bukti yang nyata) yakni hujjah yang jelas dan terang.
t_id.iwq: Dan juga pada Musa (terdapat tanda-tanda kekuasaan Allah) ketika Kami mengutusnya kepada Fir'aun dengan membawa mukjizat yang nyata.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وفي موسى» معطوف على فيها، المعنى وجعلنا في قصة موسى آية «إذ أرسلناه إلى فرعون» ملتبسا «بسلطان مبين» بحجة واضحة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَفِي مُوسَىٰٓ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِسُلۡطَٰنٖ مُّبِينٖ (وَفِي مُوسَى: فِي إِرْسَالِنَا مُوسَى - عليه السلام -: آيَةٌ لِلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ العَذَابَ, بِسُلْطَانٍ مُّبِينٍ: بِآيَاتٍ، وَمُعْجِزَاتٍ ظَاهِرَةٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan juga pada Musa) di-'athaf-kan kepada lafal Fiihaa. Maknanya, Dan Kami jadikan pada kisah Musa suatu tanda (ketika Kami mengutusnya kepada Firaun) (dengan membawa bukti yang nyata) yakni hujjah yang jelas dan terang

ar: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكۡنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونࣱ
ar_simple: فتولى بركنه وقال سحر أو مجنون

t.sahih-int: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman
t.asad: and he turned away in [the pride of] his power and said, “A sorcerer [is this Moses], or a madman!” –
t.yusuf-ali: But (Pharaoh) turned back with his Chiefs, and said, "A sorcerer, or one possessed
t.pickthall: But he withdrew (confiding) in his might, and said: A wizard or a madman
t.arberry: but he turned his back, with his court, saying, 'A sorcerer, or a man possessed
t.hilali-khan: But [Fir'aun (Pharaoh)] turned away (from Belief in might) along with his hosts, and said: "A sorcerer, or a madman
t.itani: But he turned away with his warlords, and said, “A sorcerer or a madman.”
t.mubarakpuri: But (he) turned away along with his hosts, and said: "A sorcerer or a madman."
t.qarib: But Pharaoh turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman
t.wahiduddin: But he turned his back, he and his courtiers, and said, "This is a sorcerer or a madman
t.shakir: But he turned away with his forces and said: A magician or a mad man
t.haleem: Pharaoh turned away with his supporters, saying, ‘This is a sorcerer, or maybe a madman,’
t.maariful: So he turned away along with his chiefs and said, “ (Mūsā is) a magician or a madman!”
t.khattab: but Pharaoh was carried away by his power, saying ˹of Moses˺, “A magician or a madman!”
t.ghali: Yet he turned away, with his (court) supporters, and said, "A sorcerer or a madman
t.irving: who turned away with his warlords and said: "[He´s either] a magician or a madman
t.iwq: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman

t_id.kemenag: Maka dia (Fir'aun) berpaling (dari iman) bersama tentaranya dan berkata: "Dia adalah seorang tukang sihir atau seorang gila".
t_id.sabiq: Karena merasa kuat, Fir'aun tidak percaya kepada Mûsâ. Fir'aun berkata, "Dia adalah seorang penyair dan gila."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka dia berpaling) yakni Firaun tidak mau beriman (bersama tentaranya) bersama dengan pasukannya; di sini bala tentara dinamakan Ar Rukn yang arti asalnya adalah pilar karena memang bala tentara itu adalah pilar atau penopang bagi pemimpinnya (dan berkata) kepada Nabi Musa, bahwa (dia adalah seorang tukang sihir atau seorang gila).
t_id.iwq: Maka dia (Fir'aun) berpaling (dari iman) bersama tentaranya dan berkata: "Dia adalah seorang tukang sihir atau seorang gila".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فتولى» أعرض عن الإيمان «بركنه» مع جنوده لأنهم له كالركن «وقال» لموسى هو «ساحر أو مجنون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكۡنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَٰحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونٞ (فَتَوَلَّى بِرُكْنِهِ: أَعْرَضَ فِرْعَوْنُ؛ مُغْتَرًّا بِقُوَّتِهِ وَجَانِبِهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka dia berpaling) yakni Firaun tidak mau beriman (bersama tentaranya) bersama dengan pasukannya; di sini bala tentara dinamakan Ar Rukn yang arti asalnya adalah pilar karena memang bala tentara itu adalah pilar atau penopang bagi pemimpinnya (dan berkata) kepada Nabi Musa, bahwa (dia adalah seorang tukang sihir atau seorang gila)

ar: فَأَخَذۡنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذۡنَـٰهُمۡ فِی ٱلۡیَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِیمࣱ
ar_simple: فأخذنه وجنوده فنبذنهم فی ٱلیم وهو ملیم

t.sahih-int: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy
t.asad: We seized him and his hosts, and cast them all into the sea: and [none but Pharaoh] himself was to blame [for what happened]
t.yusuf-ali: So We took him and his forces, and threw them into the sea; and his was the blame
t.pickthall: So We seized him and his hosts and flung them in the sea, for he was reprobate
t.arberry: So We seized him and his hosts, and We cast them into the sea, and he blameworthy
t.hilali-khan: So We took him and his hosts, and dumped them into the sea, while he was to be blamed
t.itani: So We seized him and his troops, and threw them into the sea, and He was to blame.
t.mubarakpuri: So We took him and his armies, and dumped them into the sea (Yamm), for he was blameworthy.
t.qarib: So We seized him and his soldiers and threw them into the sea. Pharaoh was to blame
t.wahiduddin: Then We seized him and his army and cast them all into the sea: he himself [Pharaoh] was to blame
t.shakir: So We seized him and his hosts and hurled them into the sea and he was blamable
t.haleem: so We seized him and his forces and threw them into the sea: he was to blame
t.maariful: So We seized him and his army, and cast them into the sea, as he was of culpable behaviour
t.khattab: So We seized him and his soldiers, casting them into the sea while he was blameworthy
t.ghali: So We took him (away) and his hosts; then We flung them off in the main, (and) he was blameworthy
t.irving: We seized him and his troops and hurled them into the deep while he was to blame
t.iwq: Thus We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy

t_id.kemenag: Maka Kami siksa dia dan tentaranya lalu Kami lemparkan mereka ke dalam laut, sedang dia melakukan pekerjaan yang tercela.
t_id.sabiq: Maka Kami menyiksa Fir'aun dan orang-orang yang ia banggakan. Mereka Kami campakkan ke laut dalam keadaan kafir dan sombong yang tercela.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka Kami siksa dia dan bala tentaranya lalu Kami lemparkan mereka) Kami campakkan mereka (ke dalam laut) hingga tenggelamlah mereka (sedangkan dia) yakni Firaun (melakukan pekerjaan yang tercela) yaitu mendustakan rasul-rasul dan mengaku-ngaku menjadi Tuhan.
t_id.iwq: Maka Kami siksa dia dan tentaranya lalu Kami lemparkan mereka ke dalam laut, sedang dia melakukan pekerjaan yang tercela.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأخذناه وجنوده فنبذناهم» طرحناهم «في اليم» البحر فغرقوا «وهو» أي فرعون «مُليم» آت بما يلام عليه من تكذيب الرسل ودعوى الربوبية
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذۡنَٰهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٞ (فَنَبَذْنَاهُمْ فِي الْيَمِّ: طَرَحْنَاهُمْ فِي البَحْرِ, مُلِيمٌ: آتٍ بِمَا يُلاُم عَلَيْهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka Kami siksa dia dan bala tentaranya lalu Kami lemparkan mereka) Kami campakkan mereka (ke dalam laut) hingga tenggelamlah mereka (sedangkan dia) yakni Firaun (melakukan pekerjaan yang tercela) yaitu mendustakan rasul-rasul dan mengaku-ngaku menjadi Tuhan

ar: وَفِی عَادٍ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَیۡهِمُ ٱلرِّیحَ ٱلۡعَقِیمَ
ar_simple: وفی عاد إذ أرسلنا علیهم ٱلریح ٱلعقیم

t.sahih-int: And in 'Aad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind
t.asad: And [you have the same message] in [what happened to the tribe of] Ad, when We let loose against them that life-destroying wind
t.yusuf-ali: And in the 'Ad (people) (was another Sign): Behold, We sent against them the devastating Wind
t.pickthall: And in (the tribe of) A'ad (there is a portent) when we sent the fatal wind against them
t.arberry: And also in Ad, when We loosed against them the withering wind
t.hilali-khan: And in 'Ad (there is also a sign) when We sent against them the barren wind
t.itani: And in Aad. We unleashed against them the devastating wind.
t.mubarakpuri: And in `Ad when We sent against them the barren wind;
t.qarib: And a sign in Aad, when We unleashed against them the devastating wind
t.wahiduddin: There is another sign in the [tribe of] 'Ad, when We sent against them a life-destroying wind
t.shakir: And in Ad: When We sent upon them the destructive wind
t.haleem: There is another sign in the Ad: We sent the life-destroying wind against them
t.maariful: And (a similar sign was left) in (the story of) ‘Ād, when We sent upon them the wind that was barren (from any benefit)
t.khattab: And in ˹the story of˺ ’Âd ˹was another lesson,˺ when We sent against them the devastating wind
t.ghali: And (also there is a sign) in c?d as We sent against them the sterile wind
t.irving: And with Ad, when We loosed a devastating wind on them
t.iwq: And in 'Aad was a sign, when We sent against them the barren wind

t_id.kemenag: Dan juga pada (kisah) Aad ketika Kami kirimkan kepada mereka angin yang membinasakan,
t_id.sabiq: Dalam kisah kaum 'Ad juga terdapat pelajaran. Yaitu ketika Kami mengirimkan angin yang tidak membawa kebaikan kepada mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan juga pada) kisah pembinasaan kaum (Ad) terdapat tanda yang dijadikan sebagai pelajaran (ketika Kami kirimkan kepada mereka angin yang membinasakan) yaitu angin yang sama sekali tidak membawa kebaikan, karena tidak membawa air hujan dan tidak dapat menyerbukkan pohon-pohon, angin ini dinamakan angin puting beliung.
t_id.iwq: Dan juga pada (kisah) Aad ketika Kami kirimkan kepada mereka angin yang membinasakan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وفي» إهلاك «عاد» آية «إذ أرسلنا عليهم الريح العقيم» هي التي لا خير فيها لأنها لا تحمل المطر ولا تلقح الشجر وهي الدبور
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَفِي عَادٍ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلۡعَقِيمَ (الْعَقِيمَ: الَّتِي لَا بَرَكَةَ فِيهَا، وَلَا تَاتِي بِخَيْرٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan juga pada) kisah pembinasaan kaum (Ad) terdapat tanda yang dijadikan sebagai pelajaran (ketika Kami kirimkan kepada mereka angin yang membinasakan) yaitu angin yang sama sekali tidak membawa kebaikan, karena tidak membawa air hujan dan tidak dapat menyerbukkan pohon-pohon, angin ini dinamakan angin puting beliung

ar: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَیۡءٍ أَتَتۡ عَلَیۡهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتۡهُ كَٱلرَّمِیمِ
ar_simple: ما تذر من شیء أتت علیه إلا جعلته كٱلرمیم

t.sahih-int: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins
t.asad: which spared nothing of what it came upon, but caused [all of] it to become like bones dead and decayed
t.yusuf-ali: It left nothing whatever that it came up against, but reduced it to ruin and rottenness
t.pickthall: It spared naught that it reached, but made it (all) as dust
t.arberry: that left nothing it came upon, but made it as stuff decayed
t.hilali-khan: It spared nothing that it reached, but blew it into broken spreads of rotten ruins
t.itani: It spared nothing it came upon, but rendered it like decayed ruins.
t.mubarakpuri: It spared nothing that it reached, but blew it into broken spreads of rotten ruins.
t.qarib: It spared nothing it came upon, and left it like decayed ruins
t.wahiduddin: and it destroyed everything over which it passed and reduced it to dust
t.shakir: It did not leave aught on which it blew, but it made it like ashes
t.haleem: and it reduced everything it came up against to shreds
t.maariful: it spared nothing it came upon, but rendered it like a stuff smashed by decay
t.khattab: There was nothing it came upon that it did not reduce to ashes
t.ghali: In no way did it come upon anything except that it left it out (and) made it as a rotten (stuff)
t.irving: it left nothing that it chanced upon without turning it into rubble
t.iwq: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins

t_id.kemenag: angin itu tidak membiarkan satupun yang dilaluinya, melainkan dijadikannya seperti serbuk.
t_id.sabiq: Angin itu tidak membiarkan suatu pun yang diterpanya melainkan dijadikannya seperti tulang yang hancur.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Angin itu tidak membiarkan sesuatu pun) baik jiwa atau harta benda (yang dilandanya, melainkan dijadikannya seperti serbuk) yakni sebagai barang rongsokan yang tercabik-cabik.
t_id.iwq: angin itu tidak membiarkan satupun yang dilaluinya, melainkan dijadikannya seperti serbuk.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ما تذر من شيء» نفس أو مال «أتت عليه إلا جعلته كالرميم» كالبالي المتفتت
tafsir.siraj-ar: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَيۡءٍ أَتَتۡ عَلَيۡهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتۡهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ (مَا تَذَرُ: مَا تَدَعُ, كَالرَّمِيمِ: كَالشَّيْءِ البَالِي)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Angin itu tidak membiarkan sesuatu pun) baik jiwa atau harta benda (yang dilandanya, melainkan dijadikannya seperti serbuk) yakni sebagai barang rongsokan yang tercabik-cabik

ar: وَفِی ثَمُودَ إِذۡ قِیلَ لَهُمۡ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِینࣲ
ar_simple: وفی ثمود إذ قیل لهم تمتعوا حتى حین

t.sahih-int: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time
t.asad: And in [the story of the tribe of] Thamud, too, when they were told, “You shall enjoy your life for [but] a little while,”
t.yusuf-ali: And in the Thamud (was another Sign): Behold, they were told, "Enjoy (your brief day) for a little while
t.pickthall: And in (the tribe of) Thamud (there is a portent) when it was told them: Take your ease awhile
t.arberry: And also in Thamood, when it was said to them, 'Take your enjoyment for a while
t.hilali-khan: And in Thamud (there is also a sign), when they were told: "Enjoy yourselves for a while
t.itani: And in Thamood. They were told, “Enjoy yourselves for a while.”
t.mubarakpuri: And in Thamud, when they were told: "Enjoy yourselves for a while!"
t.qarib: And a sign in Thamud, it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a while
t.wahiduddin: In the Thamud [there was another sign], when they were told, "Make the most of your lives for a while
t.shakir: And in Samood: When it was said to them: Enjoy yourselves for a while
t.haleem: And also in the Thamud: it was said to them, ‘Make the most of your lives for a while,’
t.maariful: And (a similar sign was left) in (the story of) Thamūd, when it was said to them, “Enjoy yourselves for a while.”
t.khattab: And in ˹the story of˺ Thamûd ˹was another lesson,˺ when they were told, “Enjoy yourselves ˹only˺ for a ˹short˺ while.”
t.ghali: And (also there is a sign) in Thamud as it was said to them, "Take your enjoyment for a while
t.irving: And with Thamud when someone told them: "Enjoy things for a while
t.iwq: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time

t_id.kemenag: Dan pada (kisah) kaum Tsamud ketika dikatakan kepada mereka: "Bersenang-senanglah kalian sampai suatu waktu".
t_id.sabiq: Dan dalam kisah kaum Tsamûd juga terdapat tanda kekuasaan Allah. Yaitu ketika dikatakan kepada mereka, "Bersenang-senanglah di negeri kalian sampai waktu yang ditentukan." Mereka enggan dan berlaku angkuh, tidak memenuhi perintah Tuhan. Maka mereka disambar petir sampai binasa. Mereka menyaksikan sendiri peristiwa itu terjadi pada mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan pada) kisah pembinasaan kaum (Tsamud) terdapat tanda yang dijadikan sebagai pelajaran (ketika dikatakan kepada mereka) sesudah mereka menyembelih unta, ("Bersenang-senanglah kalian sampai suatu waktu") yakni sampai habisnya ajal kalian, dan di dalam ayat lain disebutkan, "Bersukarialah kamu sekalian di rumah kalian selama tiga, hari." (Q.S. Hud, 65)
t_id.iwq: Dan pada (kisah) kaum Tsamud ketika dikatakan kepada mereka: "Bersenang-senanglah kalian sampai suatu waktu".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: (وفي) إهلاك (ثمود) آية (إذ قيل لهم) بعد عقر الناقة (تمتعوا حتى حين) إلى انقضاء آجالكم كما في آية "" تمتعوا في داركم ثلاثة أيام
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَفِي ثَمُودَ إِذۡ قِيلَ لَهُمۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٖ (تَمَتَّعُوا حَتَّى حِينٍ: انْتَفِعُوا بِحَيَاتِكُمْ حَتَّى تَنْتَهِيَ آجَالُكُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan pada) kisah pembinasaan kaum (Tsamud) terdapat tanda yang dijadikan sebagai pelajaran (ketika dikatakan kepada mereka) sesudah mereka menyembelih unta, ("Bersenang-senanglah kalian sampai suatu waktu") yakni sampai habisnya ajal kalian, dan di dalam ayat lain disebutkan, "Bersukarialah kamu sekalian di rumah kalian selama tiga, hari." (Q.S. Hud)

ar: فَعَتَوۡا۟ عَنۡ أَمۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمۡ یَنظُرُونَ
ar_simple: فعتوا عن أمر ربهم فأخذتهم ٱلصعقة وهم ینظرون

t.sahih-int: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on
t.asad: after they had turned with disdain from their Sustainer’s commandment - whereupon the thunderbolt of punishment overtook them while they were [helplessly] looking on
t.yusuf-ali: But they insolently defied the Command of their Lord: So the stunning noise (of an earthquake) seized them, even while they were looking on
t.pickthall: But they rebelled against their Lord's decree, and so the thunderbolt overtook them even while they gazed
t.arberry: Then they turned in disdain from the commandment of their Lord, and the thunderbolt took them and they themselves beholding
t.hilali-khan: But they insolently defied the Command of their Lord, so the Sa'iqah overtook them while they were looking
t.itani: But they defied the command of their Lord, so the lightning struck them as they looked on.
t.mubarakpuri: But they insolently defied the command of their Lord, so the Sa`iqah overtook them while they were looking.
t.qarib: But they defied their Lord's command, so the thunderbolt struck them as they looked
t.wahiduddin: But they rebelled against the command of their Lord. So the thunderbolt overtook them while they looked on
t.shakir: But they revolted against the commandment of their Lord, so the rumbling overtook them while they saw
t.haleem: but they rebelled against their Lord’s command, so the blast took them. They looked on helplessly
t.maariful: Then they rebelled against the command of your Lord; so the thunderbolt (of divine punishment) seized them, while they were looking on
t.khattab: Still they persisted in defying the commands of their Lord, so they were overtaken by a ˹mighty˺ blast while they were looking on
t.ghali: Yet they rebelled against the Command of their Lord; so that stunning (thunderbolt) took them (away) (while) they were looking on
t.irving: They strutted around against their Lord´s command, as the Thunderbolt caught them while they were looking on
t.iwq: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on

t_id.kemenag: Maka mereka berlaku angkuh terhadap perintah Tuhannya, lalu mereka disambar petir dan mereka melihatnya.
t_id.sabiq: Dan dalam kisah kaum Tsamûd juga terdapat tanda kekuasaan Allah. Yaitu ketika dikatakan kepada mereka, "Bersenang-senanglah di negeri kalian sampai waktu yang ditentukan." Mereka enggan dan berlaku angkuh, tidak memenuhi perintah Tuhan. Maka mereka disambar petir sampai binasa. Mereka menyaksikan sendiri peristiwa itu terjadi pada mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka berlaku angkuh) bersikap sombong (terhadap perintah Rabb mereka) yaitu mereka tidak mau mengerjakannya (lalu mereka disambar petir) yakni teriakan yang membinasakan mereka, hal ini terjadi setelah tiga hari sejak mereka menyembelih unta itu (sedangkan mereka melihatnya) karena azab itu terjadi di siang hari.
t_id.iwq: Maka mereka berlaku angkuh terhadap perintah Tuhannya, lalu mereka disambar petir dan mereka melihatnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فعتوْا» تكبروا «عن أمر ربهم» أي عن امتثاله «فأخذتهم الصاعقة» بعد مضي الثلاثة أيام أي الصيحة المهلكة «وهم ينظرون» أي بالنهار
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَعَتَوۡاْ عَنۡ أَمۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمۡ يَنظُرُونَ (فَعَتَوْا: تَكَبَّرُوا، وَعَصَوْا, الصَّاعِقَةُ: الصَّيْحَةُ المُهْلِكَةُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka berlaku angkuh) bersikap sombong (terhadap perintah Rabb mereka) yaitu mereka tidak mau mengerjakannya (lalu mereka disambar petir) yakni teriakan yang membinasakan mereka, hal ini terjadi setelah tiga hari sejak mereka menyembelih unta itu (sedangkan mereka melihatnya) karena azab itu terjadi di siang hari

ar: فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِیَامࣲ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِینَ
ar_simple: فما ٱستطعوا من قیام وما كانوا منتصرین

t.sahih-int: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves
t.asad: for they were unable even to rise, and could not defend themselves
t.yusuf-ali: Then they could not even stand (on their feet), nor could they help themselves
t.pickthall: And they were unable to rise up, nor could they help themselves
t.arberry: and they were not able to stand upright, and were not helped
t.hilali-khan: Then they were unable to rise up, nor could they help themselves
t.itani: They could not rise up, nor could they find help.
t.mubarakpuri: Then they were unable to rise up, nor could they help themselves.
t.qarib: They were unable to rise, nor could they find help
t.wahiduddin: they could not stand up again, nor could they defend themselves
t.shakir: So they were not able to rise up, nor could they defend themselves
t.haleem: they could not even remain standing, let alone defend themselves
t.maariful: Then they were neither able to stand (before the punishment), nor could they defend themselves
t.khattab: Then they were not able to rise up, nor were they helped
t.ghali: So in no way were they able to be upright, and in no way were they vindicators
t.irving: They were unable to withstand it nor were they supported
t.iwq: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves

t_id.kemenag: Maka mereka sekali-kali tidak dapat bangun dan tidak pula mendapat pertolongan,
t_id.sabiq: Sekali-kali mereka tidak dapat bangun dan tidak pula berhasil menolak azab.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka sama sekali tidak dapat bangun) mereka tidak mampu bangkit sewaktu azab turun kepada mereka (dan tiadalah mereka orang-orang yang dapat mengalahkan) yang membinasakan mereka.
t_id.iwq: Maka mereka sekali-kali tidak dapat bangun dan tidak pula mendapat pertolongan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فما استطاعوا من قيام» أي ما قدروا على النهوض حين نزول العذاب «وما كانوا منتصرين» على من أهلكهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مِن قِيَامٖ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُنتَصِرِينَ (مِن قِيَامٍ: مِنْ نُهُوضٍ، وَلَا هَرَبٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka sama sekali tidak dapat bangun) mereka tidak mampu bangkit sewaktu azab turun kepada mereka (dan tiadalah mereka orang-orang yang dapat mengalahkan) yang membinasakan mereka

ar: وَقَوۡمَ نُوحࣲ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوا۟ قَوۡمࣰا فَـٰسِقِینَ
ar_simple: وقوم نوح من قبل إنهم كانوا قوما فسقین

t.sahih-int: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient
t.asad: And [thus, too, We destroyed] Noah’s people aforetime: for they were iniquitous folk
t.yusuf-ali: So were the People of Noah before them for they wickedly transgressed
t.pickthall: And the folk of Noah aforetime. Lo! they were licentious folk
t.arberry: And the people of Noah before; surely they were an ungodly people
t.hilali-khan: (So were) the people of Nuh (Noah) before them. Verily, they were a people who were Fasiqun (rebellious, disobedient to Allah)
t.itani: And before that, the people of Noah. They were immoral people.
t.mubarakpuri: (So were) the people of Nuh before them. Verily, they were a people who were rebellious.
t.qarib: And before that the people of Noah. They were wicked people
t.wahiduddin: [We destroyed] the people of Noah before them. They were certainly a sinful people
t.shakir: And the people of Nuh before, surely they were a transgressing people
t.haleem: Before that We destroyed the people of Noah. They were a truly sinful people
t.maariful: And (We have destroyed) the people of NūH even before; indeed they were a sinful people
t.khattab: And the people of Noah ˹had also been destroyed˺ earlier. They were truly a rebellious people
t.ghali: And the people of Nuh (Noah) earlier, surely they were an immoral people
t.irving: And Noah´s people had already been such immoral folk
t.iwq: And We destroyed the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient

t_id.kemenag: dan (Kami membinasakan) kaum Nuh sebelum itu. Sesungguhnya mereka adalah kaum yang fasik.
t_id.sabiq: Sebelum mereka, kaum Nabi Nûh juga telah Kami binasakan. Mereka adalah kaum yang benar-benar tidak taat kepada Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan kaum Nuh) kalau dibaca Qaumi Nuuh, dibaca Jar, berarti di-'athaf-kan kepada lafal Tsamuuda; yakni di dalam pembinasaan mereka dengan azab yang turun dari langit dan azab dari bumi terdapat pelajaran. Kalau dibaca Nashab yakni Qauma Nuuh artinya, kami telah membinasakan kaum Nuh (sebelum itu) sebelum dibinasakan orang-orang yang telah disebutkan tadi. (Sesungguhnya mereka adalah kaum yang fasik).
t_id.iwq: dan (Kami membinasakan) kaum Nuh sebelum itu. Sesungguhnya mereka adalah kaum yang fasik.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقوم نوح» بالجر عطف على ثمود أي وفى إهلاكهم بما في السماء والأرض آية, وبالنصب أي وأهلكنا قوم نوح «من قبل» أي قبل إهلاك هؤلاء المذكورين «إنهم كانوا قوما فاسقين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَوۡمَ نُوحٖ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمٗا فَٰسِقِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan kaum Nuh) kalau dibaca Qaumi Nuuh, dibaca Jar, berarti di-'athaf-kan kepada lafal Tsamuuda; yakni di dalam pembinasaan mereka dengan azab yang turun dari langit dan azab dari bumi terdapat pelajaran. Kalau dibaca Nashab yakni Qauma Nuuh artinya, kami telah membinasakan kaum Nuh (sebelum itu) sebelum dibinasakan orang-orang yang telah disebutkan tadi. (Sesungguhnya mereka adalah kaum yang fasik)

ar: وَٱلسَّمَاۤءَ بَنَیۡنَـٰهَا بِأَیۡی۟دࣲ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
ar_simple: وٱلسماء بنینها بأیید وإنا لموسعون

t.sahih-int: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander
t.asad: AND IT IS We who have built the universe with [Our creative] power; and, verily, it is We who are steadily expanding it
t.yusuf-ali: With power and skill did We construct the Firmament: for it is We Who create the vastness of pace
t.pickthall: We have built the heaven with might, and We it is Who make the vast extent (thereof)
t.arberry: And heaven -- We built it with might, and We extend it wide
t.hilali-khan: With power did We construct the heaven. Verily, We are Able to extend the vastness of space thereof
t.itani: We constructed the universe with power, and We are expanding it.
t.mubarakpuri: With Hands We constructed the heaven. Verily, We are able to expand the vastness of space thereof.
t.qarib: We built the universe with power, and We are steadily expanding it
t.wahiduddin: We built the universe with Our might, giving it its vast expanse
t.shakir: And the heaven, We raised it high with power, and most surely We are the makers of things ample
t.haleem: We built the heavens with Our power and made them vast
t.maariful: And the sky was built by Us with might; and indeed We are the expanders
t.khattab: We built the universe with ˹great˺ might, and We are certainly expanding ˹it˺
t.ghali: And the heaven (is also a sign). We have built it with (Our) Hands (i.e., Capability) and surely We are indeed extending (it) wide
t.irving: The sky We have built firmly and We are extending it
t.iwq: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are its expander

t_id.kemenag: Dan langit itu Kami bangun dengan kekuasaan (Kami) dan sesungguhnya Kami benar-benar berkuasa
t_id.sabiq: Langit itu Kami kokohkan dengan kekuatan Kami. Sesungguhnya Kami mampu menjadikannya lebih dari itu. (1) Dan bumi itu Kami bentangkan. Maka sebaik-baik yang mempersiapkannya untuk tempat tinggal adalah Kami. (1) Ayat ini mengisyaratkan beberapa rahasia ilmiah. Di antaranya, bahwa Allah Swt. menciptakan alam yang luas ini dengan kekuasaan-Nya. Dia Mahakuasa atas segala sesuatu. Kata samâ' (langit) pada ayat tersebut dimaksudkan sebagai segala sesuatu yang ada di atas dan menaungi. Maka, segala sesuatu yang ada di sekitar benda-benada langit seperti planet, bintang, tata surya dan galaksi juga disebut langit. Bagian alam raya yang terlihat ini amatlah luas, tak terbayangkan dan tak terbatas, sebab jaraknya bisa mencapai jutaan tahun cahaya. Menurut ilmu pengetahuan modern, satu tahun cahaya berarti jarak yang dilalui cahaya dengan kecepatan 300. 000 km per detik. Frase "Wa Innâ Lamûsi'ûn" ('dan Kami meluaskannya') menunjukkan hal itu. Artinya, Kami meluaskan alam tersebut dengan sebegitu luasnya sejak diciptakan. Ayat tersebut juga menunjukkan bahwa meluasnya alam terus berlangsung sepanjang masa. Ini juga telah ditemukan dalam ilmu pengetahuan modern yang dikenal dengan teori ekspansi. Menurut teori tersebut, nebula di luar galaksi tempat kita tinggal menjauh dari kita dengan kecepatan yang berbeda-beda. Bahkan benda-benda langit dalam satu galaksi pun saling menjauh satu sama lainnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan langit itu Kami bangun dengan kekuasaan Kami) dengan kekuatan Kami (dan sesungguhnya Kami benar-benar berkuasa) dikatakan Adar Rajulu Ya-idu Qawiyyu artinya lelaki itu menjadi kuat. Dikatakan Awsa'ar Rajulu, artinya ia menjadi orang yang memiliki pengaruh dan kekuatan.
t_id.iwq: Dan langit itu Kami bangun dengan kekuasaan (Kami) dan sesungguhnya Kami benar-benar berkuasa

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والسماء بنيناها بأيد» بقوة «وإنا لموسعون» قادرون يقال: أد الرجل يئيد قوي، وأوسع الرجل: صار ذا سعة وقوة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيۡنَٰهَا بِأَيۡيْدٖ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ (بِأَيْدٍ: بِقُوَّةٍ، وَقُدْرَةٍ عَظِيمَةٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan langit itu Kami bangun dengan kekuasaan Kami) dengan kekuatan Kami (dan sesungguhnya Kami benar-benar berkuasa) dikatakan Adar Rajulu Ya-idu Qawiyyu artinya lelaki itu menjadi kuat. Dikatakan Awsa'ar Rajulu, artinya ia menjadi orang yang memiliki pengaruh dan kekuatan

ar: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ فَرَشۡنَـٰهَا فَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡمَـٰهِدُونَ
ar_simple: وٱلأرض فرشنها فنعم ٱلمهدون

t.sahih-int: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer
t.asad: And the earth have We spread out wide - and how well have We ordered it
t.yusuf-ali: And We have spread out the (spacious) earth: How excellently We do spread out
t.pickthall: And the earth have We laid out, how gracious is the Spreader (thereof)
t.arberry: And the earth -- We spread it forth; O excellent Smoothers
t.hilali-khan: And We have spread out the earth, how Excellent Spreader (thereof) are We
t.itani: And the earth—We spread it out—How well We prepared it!
t.mubarakpuri: And We have made the earth a Firash; how excellent spreader (thereof) are We!
t.qarib: And the earth We spread it out, How well We smoothed it out
t.wahiduddin: We have spread out the earth, how well We have spread it out
t.shakir: And the earth, We have made it a wide extent; how well have We then spread (it) out
t.haleem: We spread out the earth- how well We smoothed it out
t.maariful: And the earth was spread out by Us as a floor; so how well have We spread it out
t.khattab: As for the earth, We spread it out. How superbly did We smooth it out
t.ghali: And the earth, We have laid it out (as) a bedding, so how excellent are the Smoothers! (i.e., Those who make the earth as a cradle)
t.irving: The earth have We spread out; how Blissful is the One Who has smoothed it off
t.iwq: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer

t_id.kemenag: Dan bumi itu Kami hamparkan, maka sebaik-baik yang menghamparkan (adalah Kami).
t_id.sabiq: Langit itu Kami kokohkan dengan kekuatan Kami. Sesungguhnya Kami mampu menjadikannya lebih dari itu. (1) Dan bumi itu Kami bentangkan. Maka sebaik-baik yang mempersiapkannya untuk tempat tinggal adalah Kami. (1) Ayat ini mengisyaratkan beberapa rahasia ilmiah. Di antaranya, bahwa Allah Swt. menciptakan alam yang luas ini dengan kekuasaan-Nya. Dia Mahakuasa atas segala sesuatu. Bagian alam raya yang terlihat ini amatlah luas, tak terbayangkan dan tak terbatas, sebab jaraknya bisa mencapai jutaan tahun cahaya. Menurut ilmu pengetahuan modern, satu tahun cahaya berarti jarak yang dilalui cahaya dengan kecepatan 300. 000 km per detik. Frase "Wa Innâ Lamûsi'ûn" ('dan Kami meluaskannya') menunjukkan hal itu. Artinya, Kami meluaskan alam tersebut dengan sebegitu luasnya sejak diciptakan. Ayat tersebut juga menunjukkan bahwa meluasnya alam terus berlangsung sepanjang masa.
